Sprinkle with half the cheese and a few basil leaves.
Repeat layer of pasta, layer of tomato sauce, layer of cheese finish with slices of mozzarella and basil leaves.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 200oC for 15 to 20 minutes to melt the cheeses.

farfalle-with-tomato-sauce-and-bacon-ste.name: Farfalle With Tomato Sauce And Bacon Step By Step
farfalle-with-tomato-sauce-and-bacon-ste.original_name: Farfalle con salsa de tomate y panceta paso a paso

ingredients.item: 150 g de panceta o bacon en tiras
400 g de tomates en lata triturados o frescos pelados
3  cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: Put a big pot with water and come and get some water. Filling dough as instructed by the package till the dente. Reserve a cup of cooking water before you run.
Meanwhile, it heats up a large frying pan with olive oil and adds the pancet into strips. Cooking at medium-high heat 5- 6 minutes till golden and slightly crispy. Withdraw and reserve.
In the same frying pan, put down the fire and pat the onion for 5 minutes till clear. Add garlic and cook another minute.
Incorpora el tomate triturado, mezcla y cocina 12-15 minutos a fuego medio, removiendo de vez en cuando, hasta que la salsa espese y pierda acidez. Ajusta de sal y pimienta.
Add the pancette back to the sauce. Mix well and, if the salsa is very thick, add some of the reserved water from the dough.
Incorporates the baked pasta into the frying pan and removes until well covered with salsa.
Sirve caliente, espolvoreando parmesano rallado y, si lo prefieres, unas hojas de albahaca fresca.

farinata-italian-flatbread.name: Farinata (italian Flatbread)

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Brush a 9-inch tart pan with 2 tablespoons olive oil and place in the oven to warm up.
Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add green onion and garlic. Cook and stir until softened, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
Mix chickpea flour with lukewarm water until smooth. Set aside for 20 minutes at room temperature.

Skim foam from the top of chickpea-water mixture. Add remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Mix in onion-garlic mixture. Season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg. Add Gruyere cheese and mix well. Remove tart tin from oven and pour in chickpea mixture.
Bake it in the preheated oven until crispy, about 15 minutes. Remove from the oven and cut into triangles before serving.

farinheira-and-apple-pillows-teleculinar.name: Farinheira And Apple Pillows
instructions: Peel the apples, cut them in cubes, put them in a frying pan, add the olive oil, sprinkle with sugar and light them on fire. Cook until the apple softens a little.
Add the brain of the undone farinheira, add the water and let it know. Finish the chopped parsley, wrap it up and book it.
Corte a massa folhada em duas partes, no sentido horizontal. Espalhe metade do recheio no centro de cada tira e dobre-as, pressionando as extremidades com um garfo para fecharem bem.

Cut the strips into small cushions, again pressing the ends of each with the fork. Have it on a tray, lined with vegetable paper, brush with the egg beaten and take it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 20 minutes or until golden.

farinheira-rolls-teleculinaria.name: Farinheira Rolls
instructions: Start the oven at 220 degrees. Peel and pinch the garlic tooth as well as the dried tomato. Remove the skin from the pharinheiras and cut them into pieces.

Light a frying pan with a thread of olive oil, add the garlic and let it shine. Add the flour and dry tomato, season with salt and pepper and let cook, in mild heat, stirring from time to time, until the farinheira is undone and golden. Saute with the white wine and let it be clear for a few minutes.
Retire do lume, salpique com a salsa picada, envolva bem e deixe arrefecer ligeiramente.
Desenrole a massa folhada e espalhe por cima o preparado anterior. Enrole no sentido do comprimento, acondicionando bem o recheio no interior. Pincele depois com o ovo batido.
Corte o rolo em rodelas e disponha-as num tabuleiro, forrado com papel vegetal. Leve ao forno durante 15 minutos. Retire e deixe arrefecer um pouco antes de servir.

farm-meatballs-with-vegetables-lezzet.name: Farm Meatballs With Vegetables
instructions: 1. For meatballs, clean the parsley and shore.
2. Peel the onion and reinde.
3. Remove the water from the onion and yeast pit.
4. Reindeed bread, planted flour, meat, eggs and spices in the gale.
5. Remove the dough from the dough of meat.
6. Bug and find it.
7. For vegetable mixture, peel the shells of onions, keres and potatoes and chop the cube cube.
8. Clean and choppers.
9. Wait for 5 minutes in lemon water for the decision of the penicillin.
10. Maydanosu.
11. 11. Heat the butter in the pot and roast onion.
12. Add tomato porridge and roast 1-2 minutes.
12. August Add carrots, keres and canned tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes.
14 July Add hot water and boil a stone.
15. Add meatballs and cook for about 10 minutes.
16. Add potatoes and peasants and cook for 5 minutes.
17. September Add chopped parser to download from January to January.
18. Taste salt, thyme and tan pepper.
19. September Serve hot.
20.  Afiyet olsun.
21. You can find the classic mother meatballs recipe with a unique location in Turkish cuisine here.

farm-stand-strata.name: Farm Stand Strata
instructions: Spray a 9x13-inch glass baking dish with cooking spray.

Lay slices of bread in the bottom of the prepared pan in a single layer, trimming and filling in gaps as necessary. Spread 1 cup Cheddar cheese, onion, green bell pepper, yellow bell pepper, red bell pepper, and bacon on top, in that order.
Whisk eggs, sour cream, mustard, seasoning blend, salt, and pepper together in a bowl until well combined. Pour mixture over bread, making sure to soak the top layer.
Cover baking pan and refrigerate strata at least 8 hours.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Uncover strata and bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
Sprinkle remaining Cheddar cheese evenly on top and return to the hot oven. Bake until Cheddar cheese is melted, 10 to 15 minutes more.
Let strata stand 5 minutes before serving.

farm-fresh-poached-eggs.name: Farm-fresh Poached Eggs

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Fill a wide pan with 4 cups water (about 3 inches deep) and bring to a boil over high heat.
Once the water boils, turn the heat down to just below a simmer (there should be no bubbles).
Crack eggs open into a ramekin.
Transfer eggs into a soup ladle, and working quickly and gently, angle your soup ladle so the eggs slip into the water.
Set a timer for 3 minutes.
After 3 minutes, use a slotted spoon to lift your eggs from the water, one at a time.
Give each a little jiggle to check that the whites are set.
If not, dip back in for 30 seconds more.
Remove and serve immediately with salt and pepper.
Your yolk should run when pierced with a fork.

farmer-cheese-dumplings.name: Farmer Cheese Dumplings

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a high saucepan with a lid over medium-high heat. Add chicken thighs and cook, stirring, until lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Add onion and cook, stirring, until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Season with salt, pepper, and cayenne. Mix in flour and stir until flour is well mixed in, making a roux, 2 to 3 minutes. You can add more flour if you want a thicker stew.

Pour in chicken broth and scrape up browned bits from the bottom. Add carrots and celery and bring gravy to a simmer. Lower heat to medium-low and maintain a steady simmer. Add thyme leaves and simmer until gravy is slightly reduced and has thickened, about 45 minutes.
Meanwhile, make the dumplings: Combine farmer's cheese, egg, rosemary, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Mix with a spoon until smooth. Add self-rising flour and mix until a very stiff batter forms.
Raise heat to medium and bring gravy back to a steady simmer. Add green onions.

Remove 1 heaping tablespoon dumpling batter at a time. Shape with the use of a second tablespoon into oval dumplings and carefully drop into the simmering liquid. You should get a total of 6 dumplings out of this recipe. Dust with cayenne pepper, cover, and reduce heat to medium-low.
Simmer and steam dumplings until they are puffed up and cooked through without stirring or peaking, about 15 minutes. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt if necessary.
Serve and enjoy!

farmers-soup-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Farmer's Soup - Recipe
instructions: Descasque a cebola e os dentes de alho e pique-os finamente. Descasque as batatas e as cenouras e corte em cubinhos.

Lay the olive oil on a pot, light the fire, add the onion and garlic teeth and let it shine slightly. Add the potato, carrot, and 1/4 of the beans drained. Cover with water, season with salt and let it cook until everything becomes soft.

Remove 1/4 of the vegetables, book and crush the remaining soup with the magic wand. Add the pasta, the vegetables you reserved and the rest of the beans drained. If necessary, add more water. Let it finish cooking, retrieve the salt and serve hot.

farmers-wifes-breakfast.name: Farmer's Wife's Breakfast

ingredients.item: Handfuls of greens such as arugula
ingredients.prep: mizuna, baby kale, or baby spinach

instructions: To make the patties, in a large bowl, knead together the lamb, fennel seed, apple cider vinegar, coconut aminos, and salt. Using your hands, form the mixture into twelve patties.

In a skillet over medium- high heat, heat 1 1/2 teaspoons ghee. Place six patties in the hot skillet and fry for 4 minutes or until brown. Flip and fry for 3 minutes. Set aside. Add the remaining ghee to the skillet and fry the remaining patties.

To make the salad, in a medium bowl, toss the greens with the olive oil, lemon, and salt until well coated. To serve, place half the salad on each plate and top with two patties and half the avocado, sauerkraut, and pomegranate seeds. Store the remaining patties for the next day’s breakfast.

farmers-market-farro-bowls.name: Farmers Market Farro Bowls

ingredients.prep: trimmed, thinly sliced on a mandoline if you’ve got one

ingredients.item: . plus  0.25 cup grapeseed or vegetable oil

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, cut crosswise into  0.25"-thick half-moons

ingredients.item: Thinly sliced or shredded raw vegetables (such as carrots
ingredients.prep: scallions, blanched sugar snap peas, baby bok choy, cucumbers, pea shoots, or alfalfa sprouts)

instructions: Pour farro into a medium saucepan of boiling salted water, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until tender, 25–30 minutes. Drain farro and spread out on a rimmed baking sheet; let cool.

Meanwhile, using a slotted spoon, carefully lower eggs into a small saucepan of boiling water and cook 6½ minutes for an oozy, jammy yolk or 7 minutes for a slightly firmer middle. Transfer eggs to a bowl of ice water with slotted spoon and let sit until cool enough to handle, about 2 minutes. Remove eggs from ice water; peel and slice in half lengthwise.

Pack radish slices into a pint jar. Whisk vinegar, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 tsp. salt, and ½ cup hot water in a small bowl until sugar and salt are dissolved. Pour brine over radish slices; let cool. Cover and chill at least 1 hour before using.

Cut tofu crosswise into ½"-thick slabs, then cut each slab on a diagonal to create 2 triangles. Pat dry with a clean kitchen towel. Heat 2 Tbsp. grapeseed oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add tofu in a single layer, season with salt, and cook, undisturbed, until golden brown underneath, about
4 minutes. Turn over and cook until golden brown on second side, about 4 minutes. Transfer tofu to a plate; reserve skillet (no need to wipe out).

Whisk lime juice, gochujang, mayonnaise, ¼ cup grapeseed oil,
1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. sesame oil, and remaining 1 Tbsp. sugar in a small bowl. Taste; season with salt if desired.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. grapeseed oil in reserved skillet over medium-high. Add zucchini, season with salt, and cook, tossing just once or twice, until tender and blistered in spots, about 4 minutes. Add remaining 1 tsp. soy sauce and 1 tsp. sesame oil and toss to coat. Transfer to a plate.

To serve, divide farro among bowls. Arrange eggs, drained pickled radish, tofu, zucchini, and raw vegetables of choice on top as desired. Drizzle each bowl with a few spoonfuls of dressing to your liking.

farmers-market-salad-with-aged-gouda-and.name: Farmers Market Salad With Aged Gouda And Roasted Portabellas

ingredients.item: Mixed spicy greens such as mustard

instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C with rack in middle.

Toss mushrooms with 3 tablespoon oil and 1/4 teaspoon each of salt and pepper in a bowl. Roast in 1 layer in a 4-sided sheet pan, turning once, until golden-brown and tender, about 15 minutes. Cool mushrooms.
Whisk together vinegar, mustard, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 1/8 teaspoon pepper, and remaining 5 tablespoons oil in a bowl until combined. Toss mushrooms, greens, and cheese with enough dressing to coat.

farmers-market-quinoa-salad.name: Farmers' Market Quinoa Salad

ingredients.item: Coarsely chopped fresh tender herbs (such as parsley

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pistachios on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop.

Meanwhile, cook green beans and sugar snap peas in a pot of boiling salted water until no longer raw but still very crunchy, about 2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a bowl of ice water and let sit until cold, about 3 minutes. Drain, pat dry, and thinly slice into bite-size pieces.

Blend herbs, oil, vinegar, mustard, and 2 Tbsp. toasted pistachios in a blender, adding water by the tablespoonful if dressing is too thick, until smooth and the consistency of heavy cream. Season with salt and pepper.

Toss beans, peas, broccoli, pea shoots, quinoa, and remaining toasted pistachios in a medium bowl to combine. Drizzle salad with dressing and toss again to nicely coat everything; season with salt and pepper.

farmhouse-cheddar-and-stilton-terrine.name: Farmhouse Cheddar And Stilton Terrine

ingredients.item: Farmhouse cheddar cheese or sharp white cheddar cheese

ingredients.prep: toasted, chopped, plus additional walnut halves for garnish

ingredients.item: Chopped fresh sage plus sprigs for garnish

instructions: Line long sides and bottom of 8 1/2x4 1/2x2 1/2-inch loaf pan with parchment paper, leaving 2-inch overhang on both long sides of pan. Spray parchment and short sides of pan with nonstick spray. Place cheddar, 4 tablespoons butter, and Sherry in large bowl. Using electric mixer, beat on medium speed until blended and smooth, stopping occasionally to scrape down sides of bowl, about 3 minutes. Place Stilton and remaining 2 tablespoons butter in medium bowl. Using clean beaters, beat until blended and smooth, stopping occasionally to scrape down sides of bowl, 2 to 3 minutes. Mix 1 1/2 cups chopped walnuts, dried cherries, and chopped sage in small bowl.

Spoon half of cheddar mixture (about 1 1/3 cups) into prepared pan, spreading in even layer. Sprinkle half of walnut mixture (about 1 cup) over in even layer; press gently to adhere. Spoon Stilton mixture in dollops over nut mixture; spread in even layer. Sprinkle remaining walnut mixture over; press gently to adhere. Spoon remaining cheddar mixture in dollops over nut mixture; smooth top. Fold parchment overhang down over outside of pan. Place plastic wrap directly onto cheese; press to compact terrine. Chill at least 4 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Let terrine stand at room temperature 1 hour before serving. Discard plastic wrap. Run knife across short end of pan to loosen terrine from pan. Place plate atop terrine; invert onto plate. Peel off parchment. Use small metal spatula to smooth surface of terrine. Garnish with walnut halves and sage sprigs.
Toss apple and pear slices with lemon juice in large bowl. Arrange fruit around terrine. Serve with water crackers.

farro-parmesan-pie.name: Farro & Parmesan Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Generously grease pan with oil. Wrap outside of pan tightly with foil (this will help prevent custard from leaking out). Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment or foil. Place springform pan on sheet.
Place farro on another rimmed baking sheet; toast in oven until fragrant and slightly darker in color, about 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, bring a large saucepan of salted water to a boil.
Add toasted farro to boiling water and cook until tender but still al dente, 20–25 minutes. Drain; let cool slightly.

Whisk 1 3/4 cups Parmesan, cream, milk, salt, nutmeg, and eggs in a large bowl. Fold in cooked farro. Pour mixture into prepared cake pan and bake until puffed and just set in center (center will jiggle slightly when pan is nudged), about 40 minutes. Remove from oven. Preheat broiler.
Sprinkle remaining 1/4 cup Parmesan over top of pie. Broil until top is golden brown, 3–4 minutes.
Let cool for 30 minutes. Run a sharp paring knife around edge of pan to loosen pie; remove pan sides.
Cut pie into wedges. Serve warm or at room temperature.

farro-and-celery-salad.name: Farro And Celery Salad

ingredients.item: Sliced celery cut very thinly on a diagonal

instructions: Bring farro and 3 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan; season lightly with salt. Reduce heat to low and simmer until tender, 45–60 minutes. Drain and let cool slightly. Transfer to a medium bowl; add sliced celery and next 4 ingredients and toss. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and lemon juice.

farro-and-cucumber-salad.name: Farro And Cucumber Salad
instructions: Cook farro in a medium pot of boiling salted water until tender but still al dente, 30–40 minutes. Drain and let cool.

Meanwhile, preheat oven to 400°. Toss bread with 2 tablespoons oil on a rimmed baking sheet, squeezing bread to help it absorb oil; season with salt and pepper. Toast until crisp but not hard, 10–15 minutes. Let cool.

Toast caraway seeds in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Coarsely chop caraway seeds. Whisk vinegar, mustard, honey, and chopped caraway seeds in a small bowl. Gradually whisk in remaining 3 tablespoons oil; season vinaigrette with salt and pepper.
Toss cucumbers, beets, dill, parsley, farro, croutons, and dressing in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Farro can be cooked 3 days ahead. Vinaigrette can be made 1 day ahead. Cover separately and chill.

farro-and-escarole-soup.name: Farro And Escarole Soup
instructions: Cook garlic, capers, and oil in a large saucepan over medium heat, stirring often, until garlic is golden, 4–6 minutes. Add onion, farro, and red pepper flakes and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is slightly softened, about 3 minutes.

Add 6 cups cold water to pot and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, partially covered, until farro is tender, 20–25 minutes. Add celery and cook, uncovered, until almost tender, about 5 minutes. Stir escarole and Parmesan into soup and continue to cook until escarole is wilted, another 4 minutes. Remove from heat and season with salt.
Do Ahead: Soup can be made 4 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container and chill.

farro-and-tomato-salad-with-fish-sauce-v.name: Farro And Tomato Salad With Fish-sauce Vinaigrette
instructions: Whisk garlic, fish sauce, vinegar, sugar, and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl until sugar dissolves.
Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.
Cook farro in a medium pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until tender, 20–25 minutes. Drain; transfer to a large bowl.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook scallions, turning occasionally, until charred all over, about 4 minutes. Transfer to bowl with farro. Add both types of tomatoes, cucumbers, parsley, and tarragon and toss to combine. Add vinaigrette and toss again to coat; season with pepper.

farro-salad-with-asparagus-and-parmesan.name: Farro Salad With Asparagus And Parmesan
instructions: Soak farro in a large bowl of water for at least 12 hours. Drain.

Fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rolling boil over high heat. Stir in drained farro and return to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and cook farro uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes. Reduce heat to low, cover, and continue simmering until tender, about 30 more minutes. Drain and allow to cool.

Meanwhile, fill another large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a boil. Add asparagus and cook, uncovered, until tender, about 3 minutes. Drain in a colander, then immediately immerse in ice water for several minutes until cold to stop the cooking process. Drain well and chop. Set aside.

Place farro, asparagus, tomatoes, walnuts, cranberries, parsley, and chives in a large bowl. Drizzle with balsamic vinaigrette and sprinkle with about 3/4 cup Parmesan cheese; toss until evenly mixed. Top with remaining 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese and serve at room temperature.

farro-salad-with-pecans-feta-and-cherrie.name: Farro Salad With Pecans, Feta, And Cherries
instructions: Combine water, farro, and salt in a small saucepan and bring to a boil. Cover and simmer over low heat until water is absorbed, about 20 minutes.
Drain, spread on a baking sheet, and chill 5 minutes.
Mix celery, feta, dried cherries, green onion, pecans, lemon zest, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Add farro; toss to combine. Serve with lemon wedges.

farro-spaghetti-with-mushrooms-and-hazel.name: Farro Spaghetti With Mushrooms And Hazelnuts

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast hazelnuts on a baking sheet, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool; set a small handful aside. Blend broth and remaining nuts in a blender until very smooth, about 5 minutes. Transfer hazelnut stock to a small bowl and stir in vinegar; season with salt and pepper.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add mushrooms, season with salt and pepper, and cook, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Add garlic and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add wine. Bring to a vigorous simmer and cook until wine is slightly reduced, about 2 minutes.

Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente (pasta will still be opaque and very firm in the center). Drain pasta, reserving 1½ cups pasta cooking liquid.

Add pasta, 1 cup pasta cooking liquid, and ½ cup hazelnut stock to mushrooms and cook, tossing often and adding more cooking liquid to help finish cooking pasta and more hazelnut stock to help thicken sauce, until pasta is al dente and sauce is thickened and coats pasta, about 5 minutes. Taste and season with salt and pepper.
Just before serving, finely grate reserved hazelnuts over pasta and top with lemon zest.

farro-tabbouleh.name: Farro Tabbouleh
instructions: Bring water and farro to a boil in a saucepan. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until farro is tender, about 30 minutes. Drain; cool.

Combine parsley and mint in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until finely chopped. Transfer to a bowl. Add farro, tomato, cucumber, onion, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper; toss lightly. Refrigerate before servings, 3 to 4 hours.

farro-with-pistachios-mixed-herbs-and-go.name: Farro With Pistachios, Mixed Herbs, And Golden Raisins
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Rinse farro under cold water. Cook in a large pot of boiling salted water, skimming surface occasionally, until tender, 20–25 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast pistachios on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop.
Whisk lemon zest, lemon juice, ginger, sugar, and ½ tsp. salt in a medium bowl. Whisking constantly, gradually add oil. Whisk until emulsified; season vinaigrette with salt and pepper.

Drain farro and rinse under cold water. Transfer to a large bowl and add chile, herbs, raisins, and pistachios; toss to combine. Drizzle with vinaigrette, season with salt and pepper, and toss to coat.
Do Ahead: Farro can be cooked 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

farro-with-roasted-mushrooms.name: Farro With Roasted Mushrooms
instructions: Soak farro in 6 cups cold water in a large bowl 1–2 hours (this will help it cook more evenly and in less time).

Meanwhile, cook spinach in a large pot of boiling generously salted water just until wilted and bright green, about 45 seconds. Immediately transfer to a large bowl of ice water and swish around in water to cool down as quickly as possible. Drain spinach and gently squeeze to remove excess liquid.

Blend spinach, ¼ cup oil, and ¼ cup water in a blender on low to break down spinach, then increase speed to high and blend until smooth, about 2 minutes. Pour through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl; discard solids. Cover and chill spinach purée until ready to use.

Drain farro and place in a large saucepan along with shallots, garlic, thyme, bay leaves, and 8 cups water. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce heat and simmer gently, stirring occasionally, until farro is tender but still al dente (you don’t want grains to burst), 12–18 minutes. Drain, discard aromatics, and return farro to saucepan. Set a few peanuts aside for serving; coarsely chop remaining peanuts and add to farro.

Preheat oven to 425°. Toss both mushrooms and ¼ cup oil in a medium bowl. Spread out in a single layer on a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet (this lets heat circulate all around and helps the mushrooms crisp instead of steam). Season with salt and roast until mushrooms are browned, soft, and crisp around the edges, 25–30 minutes. Let cool slightly, then return to bowl and toss with 1 Tbsp. lemon juice; set aside.

Add 3 Tbsp. water to farro and gently reheat over medium-low until just warmed through. Remove from heat and mix in just enough spinach purée to coat grains (you don’t want the mixture to be saucy; you’ll have some sauce leftover), then remaining 1 Tbsp. lemon juice. Drizzle with oil; season with salt.
Spoon farro into shallow bowls and layer mushrooms over top. Drizzle with a little more oil; finely grate reserved peanuts over top.

farro-with-wild-mushrooms.name: Farro With Wild Mushrooms

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place porcini mushrooms in a bowl and cover with warm water; soak until mushrooms are reconstituted, 20 to 30 minutes. Drain and chop mushrooms.

Heat olive oil in a pot over medium-high heat. Add cremini mushrooms and 1 pinch salt; sauté until slightly golden and moisture cooks off, 5 to 10 minutes. Add chopped porcini mushrooms, reduce heat to medium; cook and stir until hot, 2 to 4 minutes.
Add onion; cook and stir until translucent and golden, 5 to 7 minutes. Add garlic; cook and stir until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Stir in farro until coated in olive oil. Increase heat to high; add 1 cup chicken broth and 1 pinch salt. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover the pot with a lid, and simmer, stirring once, until liquid is absorbed, about 10 minutes.

Increase heat to high; stir in remaining 2 cups chicken broth. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium-low, cover the pot with a lid, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until farro starts to get tender, about 15 minutes. Remove the lid; simmer, uncovered, until farro reaches desired tenderness, about 15 minutes more.
Reduce heat to low; stir in crème fraîche and parsley. Season with salt and black pepper. Stir in Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese; serve.

farro-with-wild-mushrooms-and-herbs.name: Farro With Wild Mushrooms And Herbs

ingredients.item: (about 8 oz.) assorted fresh mushrooms (such as chanterelle
ingredients.prep: porcini, lobster, maitake, and crimini), cut into 1” pieces

instructions: Cook farro in boiling salted water until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain, let cool, and set aside. DO AHEAD: Farro can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy skillet over medium-high heat until it shimmers (the oil needs to be very hot to crisp the mushrooms). Working in batches, and adding more oil if needed, place a single layer of mushrooms in skillet. Cook, turning once, until crisp and cooked through, 4–5 minutes. Transfer to a plate; season with salt and pepper.

Bring broth to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add farro and cook, stirring often, until heated through. Season farro with salt and pepper. Add butter and stir vigorously to combine and create a creamy texture. Add mushrooms, parsley, chives, and thyme; stir just to evenly incorporate. Serve immediately.

farro-radicchio-and-roasted-beet-salad.name: Farro, Radicchio, And Roasted Beet Salad
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Arrange beets in single layer in 8x8x2-inch baking dish. Drizzle with vegetable oil. Cover with foil and roast until beets are tender, about 45 minutes. Cool. Trim beets; peel. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; chill.

Cook farro in large saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, stirring occasionally, about 20 minutes. Drain. Transfer to large bowl. Stir 2 tablespoons olive oil, 1 tablespoon vinegar, and garlic into hot farro. Cool to room temperature.
Cut each beet into 6 to 8 wedges. Add beets, radicchio, onion, and parsley to farro; toss to incorporate evenly. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Whisk 2 tablespoons olive oil and 3 tablespoons vinegar in small bowl. Drizzle over salad. Add feta cheese; toss to coat.

farro-vegetable-hash-with-chermoula.name: Farro-vegetable Hash With Chermoula

ingredients.item: (lightly packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems
(lightly packed) parsley leaves with tender stems
A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Toast coriander seeds and cumin seeds in a dry small skillet over medium-high heat, tossing occasionally, until fragrant and just beginning to take on color, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a spice mill or mortar and pestle and let cool. Add peppercorns and finely grind; set aside.

Purée cilantro, parsley, mint, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, and ¼ cup water in a blender, adding more water 1 Tbsp. at a time if needed, until a coarse purée forms. Transfer to a small bowl. Add oil, lemon zest, red pepper flakes, and reserved spice mixture. Season chermoula with salt and more lemon juice if needed.
Cook farro in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until al dente, 30–40 minutes. Drain farro well and let cool slightly.

Meanwhile, preheat oven to 375°. Toss sweet potatoes on a large rimmed baking sheet with 2 Tbsp. oil to coat; season with salt. Roast, tossing halfway through, until lightly browned and tender, 12–15 minutes.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium. Add bacon and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned and mostly crisp, 7–9 minutes. Add onion and thyme and cook, tossing occasionally, until onion is softened, 6–8 minutes. Add garlic and brussels sprouts and cook, tossing occasionally, until garlic is softened and brussels sprouts are bright green and crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Add farro, sweet potatoes, and 1 Tbsp. benne seeds. Cook hash, tossing occasionally, until farro is warmed through, about 3 minutes; season with salt and pepper.
To serve, divide hash among plates and top with eggs. Spoon chermoula over and sprinkle with benne seeds.

farrotto-with-fried-egg.name: Farrotto With Fried Egg
instructions: Heat oil in a small nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Crack egg into skillet and fry until egg white is set but yolk is still soft and runny, about 3 minutes. Top farroto with egg and hot sauce.

fasolakia.name: Fasolakia
instructions: Heat 1/4 cup olive oil in a skillet over medium heat; cook and stir onion until tender, about 10 minutes. Mix remaining olive oil, green beans, tomatoes, potato, mint, parsley, salt, and pepper into onion, adding enough water to cover the whole mixture. Bring liquid to a boil, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer until potatoes are tender, about 1 hour.

fasolakia-greek-green-beans.name: Fasolakia (greek Green Beans)
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Stir in onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. Add green beans and stir until coated in oil. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 to 3 minutes. Add puréed tomatoes, potatoes, salt, pepper, and sugar. Stir well, then add enough water to barely cover beans.

Cover the saucepan partially with a lid. Bring to a simmer over medium-low heat and cook gently until green beans and potatoes are soft, 25 to 30 minutes. Uncover towards the end of cooking to reduce sauce if it is too watery.

fast-and-creamed-spinach.name: Fast And Creamed Spinach

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large soup pot over high heat; add spinach, cover, and cook for 1 minute. Uncover and gently stir until most of the leaves are bright green and wilted, about 2 minutes.

Quickly drain spinach in a strainer and transfer to a plate lined with 4 or 5 paper towels. Once cool enough to handle, squeeze as much liquid from the spinach as possible. Transfer spinach to a cutting board and coarsely chop.
Mix cayenne pepper, nutmeg, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl.

Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat; stir in shallot and cook until just barely golden and translucent, 3 to 4 minutes. Stir in seasoning mixture and pour in cream; increase heat to medium-high and simmer until the cream sauce reduces by about half, about 5 minutes. Stir in lemon zest.

Reduce heat to low and toss spinach with cream sauce in skillet. Cook and stir until spinach is heated through and coated, about 2 minutes. Stir in Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese until thoroughly combined.
Serve immediately.

fast-and-delicious-black-bean-soup.name: Fast And Delicious Black Bean Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Stir in onion, bell pepper, carrot, and garlic; cook until tender, about 5 minutes. Mix in 1/2 of the black beans, then add chicken broth.

In a blender, purée remaining beans until smooth; stir into the pot and bring soup to a boil. Reduce the heat to low. Mix in ham, salt, cumin, and pepper; simmer for 20 minutes. Garnish with Cheddar cheese and sour cream to serve.

fast-and-fabulous-egg-and-cottage-cheese.name: Fast And Fabulous Egg And Cottage Cheese Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a 10x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.
Mix together cottage cheese, beaten eggs, Monterey Jack cheese, green chiles, melted butter, flour, bacon, and baking powder in a large bowl until well combined; pour into the prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Reduce heat to 177°C (175 degrees C) and continue baking until a toothpick inserted into the center of casserole comes out clean, about 30 minutes more.

fast-and-spicy-chicken-noodle-soup.name: Fast And Spicy Chicken Noodle Soup
instructions: 1. Combine the cooked shredded chicken, cooked vermicelli noodles, and chicken broth in a pot.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat until thoroughly hot.
3. Ladle the hot soup into serving bowls.
4. Top each serving with sliced jalapeño, fresh Thai basil leaves, bean sprouts, thinly sliced red onion, and lime wedges.
5. Serve with Sriracha and hoisin sauce on the side for seasoning to taste.

fast-and-zucchini-soup.name: Fast And Zucchini Soup
instructions: Stir water, zucchini, and bouillon cubes together in a stockpot; bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium, then cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until zucchini is tender, about 20 minutes.
Carefully drop cream cheese into the stockpot.
Cook and stir until melted, about 5 minutes.
Blend soup with an immersion blender until smooth.

fast-chicken-soup-base.name: Fast Chicken Soup Base

ingredients.prep: peeled and cut into rounds or half rounds, depending on size

instructions: Bring broth and water to a simmer over medium-high heat in a large soup kettle. Meanwhile, separate chicken meat from skin and bones; reserve meat. Add skin and bones to the simmering broth. Reduce heat to low, partially cover and simmer until bones release their flavor, 20 to 30 minutes.
Strain broth through a colander into a large container; reserve broth and discard skin and bones. Return kettle to burner set on medium-high.

Add oil, then onions, carrots and celery. Saute until soft, about 8 to 10 minutes. Add chicken, broth and thyme. Bring to a simmer. (Can be refrigerated up to 3 days in advance. Return to a simmer before adding the extras of your choice.)

fast-food-argiro.name: Fast Food

ingredients.item: 100 grit butter or coconut butter melted and cold
100 grit butter or coconut butter melted and cold

instructions: In a pot, add the milk or water, with the sugar warm.
Add the salt, vanillas and semolina raincoat and mix with wire until it boils and binds.
Once it thickens, remove it from the heat and add the vegetable butter.
Mix to melt the butter well.
Let it cool and tighten slightly.

fast-upside-down-turkey.name: Fast Upside-down Turkey
instructions: Place turkey in a large pan, bowl, or tub. Remove the neck and innards and save to make a gravy, if desired. Season the inside of the turkey with 1 1/2 tablespoons salt, and then the outside with the rest, until the entire surface of the bird has a thin coating of salt crystals. Transfer to the refrigerator, uncovered, and let brine for 12 to 24 hours.
Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C). Set a large foil roasting pan over a sheet pan.
Cut the bread loaf lengthwise into two halves. Butter generously and place buttered-side up into the prepared roasting pan, pushing bread halves together so they are touching.

Remove turkey from the fridge and stuff sage, rosemary, and thyme into the cavity. Tie the legs together with kitchen string and place breast-side down on top of the bread, making sure turkey is as steady and straight-up as possible. Tuck wing tips up and over the drumette.

Roast in the preheated oven until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh registers 74°C (74 degrees C), about 2 hours. Let turkey rest for at least 15 to 20 minutes before carving.
In the meantime, cut bread into cubes and transfer onto a serving plate; keep warm as needed. Spoon juices onto the turkey, place it on top of the bread, and carve.

fasting-apple-cake-argiro.name: Fasting Apple Cake
instructions: Lubricate with brush and spread anti-stick paper in a long form 10×25 cm.
Preheat the evening to 160°C, in the air.
Shake the flour in a bowl and set aside.
Rub one apple on the grater.
Cut the second apple into small frames and add to a separate bowl.
In a bowl, add the oil, sugar, corn flour and cinnamon and mix with wire.
Add the lemon juice and the soda and mix well.
Add half the flour and mix.
Add the remaining flour and grated apple and mix with spatula until the mixture is homogenized.
Transfer the mixture to the form.
Place the chopped apples on the surface and press them slightly so that they are slightly into the dough.
Place the pan on the medium rack of the oven and bake for about 50 minutes, until well baked and in the center (try with a knife or stick).
Allow the cake to cool completely before taking off.
Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.

fasting-apple-pie-argiro.name: Fasting Apple Pie
instructions: Add the raisins to briquette first, pour them with the cognac and heat in low heat.
Remove from the house and cover with membrane. Let the raisins soak and puff for 10 minutes.
We grind the nuts in the blender.
Clean the apples with a knife and cut them to 4 and cut them into thin slices each quarter.
We sprinkle them with lemon juice.
Brush the Leaf with olive oil or seed oil and sauté the crumbs.
Sprinkle with 1 pinch of cinnamon.
Allow them to brown for 2-3 ́ and add them to the apples, as well as the nuts and sugar (keep 4 tabletspoons for the leaves).
Drain the raisins and add them to the filling.
Mix the filling very well.
Preheat the oven to 200oC. We spread paper on the counter.
Place a sheet on it, oil with a brush and sprinkle with some sugar.
Repeat the same with the rest of the cards.
After laying the 6 sheets on top of each other, empty half the filling along.
Close the side of the leaf and wrap our pie in a roll.
Make sure that the leaf compound is down.
Add some oil on the outside and transfer the pie to a baking pan.
In the same way we make the second roll.
Bake for 25 minutes until the leaves are well browned.
Once they are removed from the oven, let them stand for 5’ and then steam with powder and cinnamon sugar.
Cut each roll into 6 pieces and serve while warm.

fasting-brownies-without-baking-argiro.name: Fasting Brownies Without Baking

ingredients.item: 1 cup of peanut butter (or total milling tahini)
3 tablespoon coconut butter melted and cold
A few drops of liquid vanilla
1 cup of peanut butter (or total milling tahini)
3 tablespoon coconut butter melted and cold
A few drops of liquid vanilla

instructions: Put all the ingredients except chocolate in the blender or mixer bowl with the cutters and paste them.
In a small vessel or bowl, add the parchment paper.
Empty the mixture, straighten the surface and freeze for 2 hours until it thickens.
After the dessert freezes, we put it on the work bench.
Turn over the frozen sweet, remove the anti-stick paper and cut it into pieces of bite size.
Sprinkle with chocolate. If you have caramel cards, put the brownies bites one by one on paper and keep them in the refrigerator always cool.
Let them defrost every time we want to serve.
Brownies can also be kept in your freezer covered very well in a vessel for many weeks

fasting-brownies-without-eggs-and-butter.name: Fasting Brownies Without Eggs And Butter
fasting-brownies-without-eggs-and-butter.original_name: Νηστίσιμα brownies χωρίς αυγά και βούτυρο
instructions: Preheat the evening to 180°C to make the fasting brownies.
Butter a small baking pan of 20×30 cm.
In bowls, mix the flour, sugar, cocoa, baking and salt.
Pour with the vegetable milk or water, oil and vanilla and gently mix until they become like a cake mixture.
Add the chocolate, walnuts and plums and mix gently.
We're emptying the pan.
Bake for about 35 minutes until it stabilizes and the surface makes a crust.
Allow the sweet to cool well to cut into pieces.

fasting-bun-without-butter-argiro.name: Fasting Bun Without Butter
instructions: We prepare the leaven first.
Dissolve the yeast in a large bowl with some lukewarm water (35oC).
Add the sugar and flour and mix the porridge.
Cover the bowl and allow the dough to rise for 20 minutes.

fasting-cake-argiro.name: Fasting Cake

ingredients.item: 300 grams of soya or coconut almond
2-3 tbsp water or coconut or almond milk
300 grams of soya or coconut almond
2-3 tbsp water or coconut or almond milk

instructions: Preheat the evening where we cook at 180°C.
Butter two round 22 cm ring uniforms or two baking pans.
We're putting paper out.
Shake all the solid ingredients in a bowl, flour, baking powder and cocoa.
Add the sugar, mix, add the milk with the melted margarine and mix again.
Finally, add the truffle, mix gently and equalize the forms.
Bake for about 35 minutes until stabilized.
Leave them to cool on a grill and then disfigure.
Cut horizontally into two pieces each.
Mix all the solid materials.
Add the melted butter and water and mix well with wire.
Beat until it turns to whipped cream.
Heat the syrup with the cognac and let it cool.
Put a cake on a tour.
Brush some syrup and rub with cream.
Add some sour sweets.
We repeat the process.
Finally, after putting on the last cake, brush around with the cream.
Garnish with chocolate rolls and sour sweet.
Alternatively, divide the mixture into two baking pans with a diameter of 26 cm or 28 cm.
Bake for less time, since the layer will be thinner, and fill the two pantespanes with one layer of cream.
So more rations come out, because she won't get too tall and have a bigger surface.
The first way, of course, is more impressive.
Freeze for 2-3 hours and serve.

fasting-cariocas-argiro.name: Fasting Cariocas
instructions: Add the first four ingredients (sugar, water, cocoa, cinnamon) into a pot, mix to dissolve cocoa and sugar and let the syrup boil for 2 minutes.
Lower the syrup from the fire.
Let it cool.

fasting-carrot-cake-argiro.name: Fasting Carrot Cake
instructions: Shake the flour with a sieve in a bowl and set aside.
Choose fresh carrots, garnish them and rub them in a thin scrub and set aside.
Preheat the oven to 170oC degrees in resistance, we will bake on the bottom oven grill.
They oil and flour a baking pan or round form with a detachable base of ECU 26 million.
For easy dissipation, you better put anti-stick paper on the base of the form.

fasting-cheesecakes-argiro.name: Fasting Cheesecakes
instructions: Mix the vegetable cheeses in a bowl with a spoon.
Add the mint chopped, some pepper and paprika sweet.

fasting-chocolate-cake-argiro.name: Fasting Chocolate Cake

ingredients.item: 300 g of almond (or soy or coconut or chocolate soy milk)
150 grenishing butter melted and lukewarm (nut margarine or other)
4 very mature and soft avocado (cut into pieces)
1/2 cup coconut milk (what we find on the shelf in a can that is denser)
300 g of almond (or soy or coconut or chocolate soy milk)
150 grenishing butter melted and lukewarm (nut margarine or other)
4 very mature and soft avocado (cut into pieces)
1/2 cup coconut milk (what we find on the shelf in a can that is denser)

instructions: First add the milk to a bowl and add the vinegar.
Mix and allow to stand for a few minutes.
Shake all the solid ingredients, flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, cinnamon and salt in a bowl.
We put them aside.
Butter and flour 2 small pieces 20 or 22 cm.
Preheat the evening to 160°C in the air.
We'll fry on the middle grill.
Add the milk, zest, melted cold butter into a bowl and mix.
Pour the liquid materials into the solids.
With a soft spatula gently mix to homogenize.
Balance the cake mixture in two baking pans.
Bake for about 35 minutes.
We're checking if they were baked with the knife blade.
Allow them to cool for 10 minutes and then remove them from the forms.
Leave them on a rack to cool completely.
Cut each cake horizontally.
We'll make cake with 4 layers of cake and 3 layers of vegan chocolate cream in between.
Or you'll leave the two pancakes thicker and make a layer of cream in between.

fasting-chocolate-sauce-without-sugar-ar.name: Fasting Chocolate Sauce Without Sugar
instructions: Without sugar and cream, you must use coconut milk.
You'll find on the supermarket shelves in cans, which is thick as cream.
Add all the ingredients into a pot over very low heat and mix gently until they melt.
Enjoy the delicious chocolate sauce without sugar in vegan sweets, or with sausages as in the recipe below.

fasting-cinnamon-beer-cookies-argiro.name: Fasting Cinnamon Beer Cookies

ingredients.item: 1 cup half seed oil and half olive oil
1 cup half seed oil and half olive oil

instructions: In a bowl, add the oil, sugar, beer, cinnamon, cloves, zest and soda and mix the sugar to melt.
Add the flour and gently ferment the dough. The dough must be soft and oily. Very malleable.
We make them in whatever shape we want and dip them into sesame optionally.
We put them in sheet metal.
Bake the fasting cookies in a well preheated evening at 160 °C in the air for about 25 minutes to brown.
In the middle of the baking, bring up and down the baking pans for uniform baking.
Sprinkle them with sesame (optional).

fasting-coconut-truffles-argiro.name: Fasting Coconut Truffles

ingredients.item: 1 cup full of finely ground almonds
1 cup full of finely ground almonds

instructions: In a bowl, add all the ingredients and mix until they are well combined.
If the mixture is thin then you add a little grated almond or coconut.
Make coconut truffles the size of a bite.
Roll them into the grated coconut.
Keep them in the fridge.
Try and if you want coconut truffles sweeter, add some stevia or other sweetener to your liking.
The final mixture must be soft and easily formed.

fasting-cookies-argiro.name: Fasting Cookies

ingredients.item: 120 gritting butter or other butter (in hot-water)
200 grcamboil (or sunflower oil or sesame oil)
120 gritting butter or other butter (in hot-water)
200 grcamboil (or sunflower oil or sesame oil)

instructions: Shake the flour and baking in a bowl and set aside for a while.
In a bowl, add the soft vegetable butter, oil, sugar and mix them very well with the wire for a few minutes to melt the sugar.
We can use a mixer. I find it unnecessary in this recipe.
Dissolve the baking soda into orange juice and add them to the mixture.
Attention: dissolve them in a high vessel because it swells and spills. And better, dissolve them over the bowl with the materials, so that if it is poured into the mixture. Add the carnation.
Finally, add the sifted flour, and by hand or spatula, gently, ferment to absorb the flour.
With a thick rolling machine, spread a 0.5 cm thick leaf and cut cookies in any shape with a knife or a Coop Pat.
In a deep dish, add the sesame and soda.
Wet the cookies with sesame soda and place them in sheet metal, one by one.
Bake the fasting biscuits for about 20 minutes, at 160.3.3. in the air, or 180.3.3. in the resists, in a well-heated oven.
Turn off the oven and let them in to draw their moisture for 10 minutes. Then we put them on a grill to cool well.
They remain crunchy until the last one. We keep them in an airtight vessel with a seal cap.

fasting-cornmeal-pie-argiro.name: Fasting Cornmeal Pie

ingredients.item: 2 flushed beans or other boiled leguminous vegetables
2 flushed beans or other boiled leguminous vegetables

instructions: Soy minced meat for 20 minutes in plenty of water.
We shake him with our hands and use him like minced meat.
Boil the water in a pot and as soon as it boils, add 2 tablespoons of salt.
Sprinkle the corn and stir in low heat let it bind and thicken the mixture, become like mashed potatoes.
After the cream thickens, remove from heat, add the butter and cover until we use it.
Heat the oil in a large deep pan.
Add the minced meat and add the onion, garlic and peppers.
Add salt and pepper.
Add the tomatoes, broken with a spoon, beans and spices.
Lower the heat and simmer with the pot covered for 10 minutes until the sauce almost drinks.
Preheat the evening to 180-2003
We butter fireproof oval or square vessel.
We make a layer, about 2 cup of corn cream, pour all the fined meat into a layerer and cover with the rest of the corn purée.
Sprinkle with the cheese and bake for about 35 minutes until it makes a light crust.
Allow to stand for 15 minutes and serve with salad.

fasting-falafel-skewers-argiro.name: Fasting Falafel Skewers
instructions: From the day before, put the legumes in bowls and cover them with plenty of water, adding a pinch of baking soda (as long as the three fingers catch). Allow them to soak for 24 hours and then rinse and drain them very well.
We don't want any moisture for falafel souvlaki.

We grind them in the meat machine along with the other ingredients (salt, pepper, soda, coriander, cumin, paprika, onion, garlic, parsley). Alternatively, we can grind all the ingredients in the mixer's bowl with the cutters.
Transfer the mixture into a bowl, cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes to mix the flavors.
Create round meatballs or long-stucked soups with no more than 2 cm thick and fry them in hot olive oil until evenly golden.

First way to serve: We warm up the Cypriot pies and open them in half, creating a pocket case. Place 2–3 falafel instruments (defending on their size) and add any accompanying ones, depending on the tastes of each.
2nd way of serving: Serve the souvlaki with falafel hot or cold, accompanied with chopped cucumber salad and tahini or yogurt.

fasting-flower-bun-with-roses-argiro.name: Fasting Flower Bun With Roses

ingredients.item: 240 gr. coconut milk lukewarm (coal milk canned or vegetable cream
A little melted vegetable cooking fat
240 gr. coconut milk lukewarm (coal milk canned or vegetable cream
A little melted vegetable cooking fat

instructions: Add the sugar, vegetable cooking fat, juice, machete, mastic and yeast to the mixer's bowl.
Mix and add the flour.
Bake for 5 minutes, strong. The dough must be soft, fluffy and buttery.
Place in a bowl. Cover it well and allow it to stand and triple in volume for 1 hour and 30 minutes at room temperature.
We're defusing her. We split it into 16 pieces.
Open each piece in thin leaf and spread vegetable cooking fat.
Open three more leaves and after buttering them, add them to each other and sprinkle sugar and cinnamon (or chocolate).
Wrap in a tight roll. Cut each roll into 5-6 slices. We make a total of 4 rolls of 4 cards each.
We open three more leaves and repeat the same process.

After finishing them all and cutting them into slices, we make parchment paper into sheet metal and form a tray with the slices of bread with the cut side touching the parchment. It takes about 20-24 slices.
From above, add the rest of the pieces, forming at the end a flower-shaped poodle.
Leave in a warm place that does not pass air, e.g. in a lukewarm oven for about 40 minutes to rise again. In off- fasting season, apply with egg solution for polishing and color.

Just before baking with melted vegetable cooking fat, sprinkle with sugar and bake in a well preheated oven at 180 degrees C in the air or 200 degrees C resistances for about 30 minutes to brown and puff.
Pour with melted chocolate lines or steam with powder.
Study here in detail all my secrets about the pies, follow them and you will make the best pies of your life, I guarantee you!

fasting-foods-drunk-with-turkish-delight.name: Fasting Foods Drunk With Turkish Delight (loukoumoglyka)

ingredients.item: 10 mastic flavoured or mixed with rose (cut to 4)
10 mastic flavoured or mixed with rose (cut to 4)

instructions: We start the traditional recipe for fasting intoxicated with lucumi, or lucoumo sweets as we call them in Paros,
Putting in a large bowl oil, sugar, wine, mastic, ouzo, vanillas, soda, and flour slowly, kneading.
Ferment the ingredients so that the dough is fluffy, soft and supple.
Take some of the dough and make it into a ball.
We're falling for the palms to open up and make a plaque.
Put a piece of loukoumi and a piece of walnut in the middle and close it carefully, giving it a long shape.
We touch them with the compound down.
After making them all, add them to a lightly oiled baking pan (2 baking pans) or with non-stick paper.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 170.3.3. degrees in air, for about 30 minutes until slightly golden.
They won't get much pink because they don't have egg yolk.
Remove them from the oven and as they are warm (be careful not hot) steam them with icing sugar.

fasting-kourabies-argiro.name: Fasting Kourabies
instructions: Add sugar, wine, cognac (or ouzo for more intense aroma), liqueur, oil, soda, salt, nutmeg and mastic in a large bowl.
Mix with wire until the sugar melts.
Add the sifted flour gradually until a soft, supple and oily dough is formed.
Add the almond and gently ferment as much as necessary to integrate. We don't ferment much so that the barbers become grated and fluffy.
Cover the dough and allow it to rest for 30 minutes.
We make pieces of dough the size of a nut and we add them to a baking pan. No need to bribe, as the dough is quite oily.
Bake in a well preheated ocean, at 160–170°C with air, for about 30 minutes, until they are inflamed and golden. During baking, take up and down the baking pans for a uniform result.
When they turn pink, they burst slightly on the surface and smell the kitchen, they are ready.
We get them hot on the counter. If you like flowerwater, sprinkle them with a few drops while they are warm.
Allow them to cool slightly and steam them with a lot of sifting powder, mixed with some cinnamon.

fasting-lasagna-with-rich-cream-and-sauc.name: Fasting Lasagna With Rich Cream And Sauce
fasting-lasagna-with-rich-cream-and-sauc.original_name: Νηστίσιμα λαζάνια με πλούσια κρέμα και σάλτσα

ingredients.item: 1 litre soy milk or vegetable broth
1 litre soy milk or vegetable broth

instructions: Heat the oil in high heat and sauté the mushrooms.
Let them drink their liquids.
Add the onions and let them wither.
Add the tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes. Salt and pepper.
Add the nuts to the sauce after cooking.

fasting-mac-and-cheese-with-baked-macaro.name: Fasting Mac And Cheese With Baked Macaroni And Cheese
fasting-mac-and-cheese-with-baked-macaro.original_name: Νηστίσιμο Mac and cheese με κοφτό μακαρονάκι και τυριά στο φούρνο

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoon butter and a little extra for baking
2 tablespoon butter and a little extra for baking

instructions: Butter small fire resistant vessel (square or oval small pyrex).
Rub the bread in crumbs in the blender.
Place in a bowl.
Add the melted vegetable butter.
Mix the crumbs.

fasting-mayonnaise-without-egg-argiro.name: Fasting Mayonnaise Without Egg

ingredients.item: 100 grams of soya, not containing added sugar
100 grams of soya, not containing added sugar

instructions: Soy herbal milk is ideal for fasting mayonnaise, alternatively you can use aquafaba.
I mean, the water from boiled chickpeas. In this case 4-5 tablespoon aquafaba is enough to replace soy milk at the beginning of the recipe.
Note also the oil you will use. If the taste of oil is intense, this will come out all the way to the taste of mayonnaise. From now on, home-cooked mayonnaise without an egg is a three-minute case.
We're gonna need a very powerful blender or rhableder for proper homogenization.
In addition to classical mayonnaise and vegan mayonnaise with avocado, you can also make this easy recipe for homemade mayonnaise without egg. It's delicious and delicious!

fasting-merenda-without-sugar-argiro.name: Fasting Merenda Without Sugar
instructions: Finely chop the chocolate first with a knife.
Add the coconut butter, honey and coconut cream to a pot with a thick base.
The fire must be very low.
Allow the ingredients to melt, stirring from time to time with a spoon.
When they melt, we withdraw the vessel from the fire.
Allow the mixture to cool.
Place it in a jar and keep it in the refrigerator for 10 days.
Enjoy the homemade portion with your breakfast as a bread grind, cakes, cookies and whatever you like.

fasting-moussaka-argiro.name: Fasting Moussaka

ingredients.item: 3/4 cups of potatoes for mashed potatoes
3/4 cups of potatoes for mashed potatoes

instructions: Wash and cut the eggplants into slices first and place them in cold water with salt for 10 minutes, so that they do not drain too much oil into the frying.
Drain well and wipe the liquids away.
Fry in olive oil until they have a light blonde color on both sides and place them on absorbent paper.
We can instead fry them, bake them in the oven after oiling them lightly, so the moussakas can be lighter.
Wash and chop the mushrooms.
In a pot add olive oil, add the onions and place them on medium heat until soft for 4 minutes.
Then, add the mushrooms and let them simmer until they drink their liquids.
Add the tomato, salt pepper and cinnamon wood.
Let them boil until the sauce thickens.

fasting-mushroom-pie-argiro.name: Fasting Mushroom Pie

ingredients.item: 1 village leaf or 6 village homemade leaves
1 village leaf or 6 village homemade leaves

instructions: First, we will bake two local leaves to absorb the liquids and make the pie tastey and crispy.
Spread the two leaves into two sets and make them in a preheated evening at 180°C for about 10 minutes, until dry and brown. Let them cool and then push them into irregular pieces.

instructions: Gochugaru and fermented black beans can be found at Asian markets.
Whisk garlic, lemon juice, paprika, curry powder, and turmeric in a medium bowl; add chicken and toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 6 hours.
DO AHEAD: Chicken can be marinated 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.
Bring raisins, vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. water to a boil in a small saucepan, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until liquid evaporates, 8–10 minutes.
Raisins can be prepared 3 days ahead. Let cool, then cover and chill.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add bell peppers and onion; season with salt. Cook, stirring often, until softened, 8–10 minutes. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are caramelized, 45–60 minutes.
Add garlic and tomato paste to skillet and continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until tomato paste begins to darken, 10–15 minutes longer. Mix in vinegar and paprika; season with salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Soffritto can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool, then cover and chill.

Remove chicken from marinade; season with salt and pepper. Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a heavy 5–6-qt. pot with a lid over medium-high heat. Cook chicken, skin side down, until skin is brown and crisp, 10–12 minutes; transfer to a plate. (You can remove bones at this point, if desired.)
Reduce heat to medium. Add chorizo to pot and cook, stirring often, until crisp, about 2 minutes; transfer to a small bowl.

Add soffritto to pot and cook, stirring constantly, until sizzling, about 1 minute. Add broth, scraping up any browned bits; season with salt (salting liquid adequately here is important for flavorful rice). Add rice, sausage, chorizo, and raisins. Stir and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, arrange chicken on top, cover pot, and simmer gently, until rice is tender, 20–25 minutes. Uncover; increase heat to medium-high. Drizzle remaining 2 Tbsp. oil around edges of pot and cook, undisturbed, until underside of rice is crunchy, about 5 minutes longer.

While rice is cooking, mix garlic, fermented beans, if using, cilantro stems, and chiles in a small bowl. Peel prawns, leaving heads and tails on. Devein, stuff cut side with garlic mixture, and set aside.

Combine clams and wine in a large skillet, cover, and cook over high heat, stirring often, until clams open (discard any that do not open), about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer clams to a large bowl.

Reduce heat to medium-low. Lightly season prawns with salt and cook in same skillet until opaque in the centers, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer prawns to bowl with clams; pour pan juices into a small bowl.
DO AHEAD: Prawns can be stuffed 1 hour ahead. Cover and chill.
Mix gochugaru, cayenne, and salt in a small bowl. Dip cut sides of lemon wedges into seasoning mix.
Top rice with prawns and clams and drizzle with reserved pan juices. Top with lemon wedges, eggs, olives, pickled chiles and peppers, and scallions.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Mix 4 tsp. za’atar into ⅓ cup oil in a small bowl. Spread out pita on a parchment-lined baking sheet, drizzle with za’atar oil, and toss until evenly coated. Bake, tossing once, until golden and crisp, 12–15 minutes. Let cool.

Whisk lemon juice, honey, remaining 3 Tbsp. oil, and remaining 1 tsp. za’atar in a large bowl. Add romaine, onion, cucumbers, tomatoes, cilantro, parsley, dill, mint, and pita chips to vinaigrette and toss to coat; season with salt.
Transfer to a platter. Top with queso fresco and sprinkle with sumac if using.
Do Ahead: Pita chips can be made 3 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature. Vinaigrette can be made 6 hours ahead; cover and chill.

faux-shoyu-ramen.name: Faux Shoyu Ramen
instructions: To a pot with 2 cups (480 ml) of boiling water add the ramen seasoning packet and a tablespoon of butter. Stir until the butter melts and then add the ramen noodle cube and cook until the noodles become tender, 2 minutes. Pour the ramen into a bowl.
To the prepared ramen, add the soy sauce and stir to incorporate.
Top with the nori, egg, bacon, scallions, and season with salt and pepper. Sprinkle with sesame seeds, if using.
Enjoy!

faux-smoked-pulled-pork-carnitas.name: Faux Smoked Pulled Pork (carnitas)
instructions: Mix brown sugar, garlic powder, chili powder, paprika, oregano, onion powder, mustard seed, black pepper, cumin, coriander, and salt together in a small bowl.
Rub pork roast liberally with brown sugar mixture.
Heat oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add pork roast; cook until browned, 3 to 5 minutes per side.
Transfer pork to a slow cooker. Add water, liquid smoke, and chipotle peppers.
Cook on Low until pork is tender, about 6 hours. Transfer pork to a cutting board and pull apart with tongs.

faux-chicken-stir-fry.name: Faux-chicken Stir-fry
instructions: Stir together soy sauce, brown sugar, rice vinegar, ginger, cornstarch, and red pepper in a small bowl.

Heat oil in a wok or extra-large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion, carrots, mushrooms, and garlic; cook, stirring, for 5 minutes. Add broccoli, bell pepper, and meatless fillets; cook, stirring, until vegetables are crisp-tender, 3 to 5 minutes more.

Push mixture to edges of wok or skillet. Stir sauce and pour into center of wok. Cook until slightly thickened, then stir to coat vegetables and fillets; heat through. Serve over hot rice and sprinkle with cashews.

faux-jito-mocktail.name: Faux-jito Mocktail
instructions: Add mint leaves and lime to a tall glass.
Using a muddler or a spoon, mash the lime and mint well.
Add sweetener, ice, and soda water. Stir to combine.
Garnish with lime and mint. Enjoy!

fava-bean-aguachile.name: Fava Bean Aguachile

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. shelled fresh or frozen fava beans
Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Toss 9 corn tortillas, each cut into 8 wedges, with 3 Tbsp. avocado oil and season with ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt on a baking sheet.
Arrange in a single layer and bake tortillas until starting to dry out, 5–7 minutes. Using tongs, turn and continue to bake until lightly browned and crispy, 5–7 minutes more.

Fill a medium pot with water and bring to a boil. Prepare an ice water bath. Cook 1 lb. shelled fresh or frozen fava beans until bright green and crisp-tender, 30–60 seconds if using fresh and 2–3 minutes if using frozen. Drain and transfer to ice water bath. Let cool, then drain again and pat dry. Remove papery membranes from beans, if needed. Transfer to a large glass or ceramic bowl.

Blend 2 serrano chiles, stemmed, seeded, ½ cup chopped cilantro, ⅓ cup fresh lime juice (from about 3 limes), 2 Tbsp. avocado oil, 2 Tbsp. mint leaves (from about 2 small sprigs), 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. plus ⅛ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2 Tbsp. water in a blender until smooth, about 2 minutes.
Add aguachile to bowl with beans and toss to combine. Let sit at room temperature 15 minutes.

If desired, transfer fava bean mixture to a large shallow serving bowl. Top with 4 small radishes, thinly sliced, and 1 medium avocado, finely chopped. Garnish with whole cilantro leaves. Season with remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. plus ⅛ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Serve with baked totopos alongside.

fava-bean-and-asparagus-salad.name: Fava Bean And Asparagus Salad

ingredients.prep: sliced thinly lengthwise on a mandoline

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pistachios on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing occasionally, until fragrant but not browned, 5–8 minutes. Let cool.

Cook fava beans in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a colander set in a bowl of ice water. Drain, remove skins, and transfer beans to a small bowl.
Combine shallot and vinegar in another small bowl; season with salt and pepper and set aside at least 10 minutes. Whisk oil into shallot mixture; season vinaigrette with salt and pepper.
Combine beans, asparagus, watercress, mint, and tarragon in a large bowl; add vinaigrette and pistachios and toss to combine. Transfer to a serving platter and top with chive blossoms, if using.

fava-bean-and-pea-salad-with-poppy-seed-.name: Fava Bean And Pea Salad With Poppy Seed Dressing

ingredients.item: Shelled fava beans (from about 2 lb. pods) or frozen fava beans
Shelled fresh peas (from about 2 lb. pods) or frozen peas

instructions: If using fresh fava beans, cook in a medium saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, about 4 minutes. Using a sieve, transfer to a colander set in a bowl of ice water. Drain well and peel; place in a medium bowl. (If using frozen fava beans, cook 2 minutes; do not peel.)

Return water in saucepan to a boil; add peas and cook until tender, about 2 minutes. Drain; transfer to colander in ice water. Drain and add to bowl with fava beans. (If using frozen peas, cook 30 seconds.)

Whisk sour cream, goat cheese, buttermilk, and lemon juice in a medium bowl, thinning with more buttermilk as needed, until pourable; season with salt and pepper. Arrange lettuce and pea shoots on a platter, top with fava beans and peas, drizzle with dressing, and sprinkle with poppy seeds.
DO AHEAD: Fava beans and peas can be cooked 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

fava-bean-bruschetta-with-chicory-and-re.name: Fava Bean Bruschetta With Chicory And Red Onion

ingredients.item: Aleppo-style pepper or crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a small pot over medium. Cook yellow onion, stirring occasionally, until soft and golden, 10–12 minutes. Add garlic, rosemary, and red pepper flakes and cook, stirring, until fragrant and garlic is soft, about 3 minutes. Add fava beans and pour in cold water to cover by 2". Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, season with salt, and simmer until tender, 45–60 minutes. Let cool slightly. Drain, reserving 1 cup cooking liquid.

Purée fava beans in a blender with ¼ cup reserved cooking liquid and 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, adding more cooking liquid as needed, until smooth. Taste and adjust seasoning with more salt, oil, and lemon juice as needed.
Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium-high. Add red onion, season with salt, and cook, stirring often, until brown but not soft, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.
Wipe skillet clean and heat 1 Tbsp. oil over medium-high. Add chicory, season with salt, and cook, tossing, until wilted slightly, about 3 minutes.
Spoon fava bean purée onto toast; top with red onion, chicory, and Aleppo-style pepper. Drizzle with oil.
Do Ahead: Fava beans can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

fava-bean-cream-with-lentils-teleculinar.name: Fava Bean Cream With Lentils
instructions: In a pot, add the beans and cover with water. Season with salt and let it cook for 5 minutes. Remove, drain, pass cold water and remove the skin. Book the water and 50 g of beans.
In another pot, add the lentils, previously washed, cover with water, season with salt and cook for 12 minutes. Take it back and run.

In a large pan, add the cooking water of the beans and add the onion and garlic, previously peeled and roughly cut, the beans and 150 g of cooked lentils and let cook for 10 minutes. Remove from the fire, reduce the puree with a magic wand and add more water if desired.
Tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva. Divida a sopa por pratos e sirva decorada com as lentilhas e as favas reservadas, um fio de azeite e trevos.

fava-bean-soup-teleculinaria.name: Fava Bean Soup
instructions: Peel the potatoes, carrots, onions and garlic; pick the onions and garlic; cut the carrot into quarters and the potato and the cabbage into cubes; peel the tomato, peel the seeds and cut it into cubes as well.

Light a pot with olive oil, garlic, onion and laurel and let it shine slightly. Add the tomato, add the water and salt and let it boil. Add the sausage, previously chopped with a fork, cabbage, potato, beans and carrot, stir and let it cook.
Remove the sausage, cut it in slices and rejoin the soup. Retrieve the seasonings and sprinkle with chopped cilantros. Remove from the fire and serve immediately.

Boil the fava in the open pot (without lid) for 30 minutes, stirring once or twice in between.
Add the sauteed vegetables, turmeric and paprika and continue cooking for about 20 minutes longer on low heat, until the fava melts completely and starts to become creamy texture.

At the end of the boil, incorporate the remaining olive oil consistently mixing with a wooden sponge – at a lowways hot spot because as the fava thickens, it is intensely building and smashing around.

fava-beans-stewed-with-fried-streaks-tel.name: Fava Beans Stewed With Fried Streaks
instructions: Season the intermeada with thick salt and let it rest in the cold overnight. In the day, wash the potatoes, cook them with the skin in salty water for 20 minutes, then drain them, let them cool down a bit and remove their skin. Also bake the beans in water for 15 minutes, then pour them out, lay them down for a pot, add the baked potatoes, chopped garlic and olive oil, take them to the fire and let them saute a little.

Take to the fire another pot with the lard, let it melt, add the intermeada cut into pieces and let it fry until golden. Then pour the intermeal, add it to the pot with the beans, season with a pinch of pepper, tape and let cook for 10 minutes, in mild heat and shaking the pot from time to time.
Wash the leaves of the leek, cut them into thin strips, add them to the pot, add also the chopped corianders, wrap, remove from the fire and serve hot.

feijoada-teleculinaria.name: Feijoada
instructions: Lay the meats and sausage in a pot and add water until they are covered. Take it to the fire and let it cook, removing the meats as they get cooked.

Peel the onions and garlic, pinch everything, lie down for a pot, add the olive oil and the laurel leaves, take it to the fire and let it cook until the onion is golden. Add the naked tomato, previously drained and chopped, the colorau and cumin, stir and let cook a few minutes.

Add the meats and sausage, all cut into small pieces and mix. Add the baked beans and carrots cut into slices and stir. Add the boiling water to the meats, until it covers everything, and let it boil.

Then correct the salt and let it cook, in mild heat, for 15 minutes or until it is clear. If necessary, add more cooking water to the meat. Serve feijoada sprinkled with chopped parsley and accompanied by white rice.

feijoada-de-domingo-sunday-bean-stew.name: Feijoada De Domingo (sunday Bean Stew)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine 6 quarts water, black beans, bay leaves, salt, and pepper in a large saucepan. Bring to boil; simmer for 50 minutes.

Bring remaining 2 quarts water to boil in a large saucepan. Stir in dried beef, pork ribs, and pig's feet; simmer until flavors combine, about 25 minutes. Add smoked sausage, spicy sausage, large bacon pieces, pork belly, pig's ear, and pig's tails; simmer until meat mixture is softened, about 25 minutes.
Stir meat mixture to the bean mixture; simmer until flavors combine, about 45 minutes.

Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat; add garlic. Cook until warmed through, about 45 seconds; transfer to bean mixture. Add small bacon pieces to the skillet; cook and stir until lightly golden, about 2 minutes. Stir in onion; cook until onion is soft and browned, about 5 minutes. Stir in parsley.
Stir the onion mixture into the bean mixture; simmer until tender, about 25 minutes. Transfer meat mixture to a serving dish. Pour beans into a separate serving dish.

feijoada-nordestino-northeastern-brazili.name: Feijoada Nordestino (northeastern Brazilian Black Bean Stew)

ingredients.prep: cut into fine ribbons, or to taste
cut in wedges, or as desired

instructions: Combine beans, onion, ham, calabresa, 3 cloves garlic, salt, cumin, black pepper, and bay leaf in a pressure cooker; cover with water to fill line.

Close cooker securely and place pressure regulator over vent according to manufacturer's instructions. Cook at high pressure until regulator is gently rocking, 5 to 7 minutes. Reduce pressure to low. Cook, adding water halfway if needed, until beans are tender and water is reduced to your liking, about 1 hour.
Turn off heat. Let pressure release naturally according to manufacturer's instructions, about 5 minutes. Unlock lid and remove. Let feijoada cool until ready to serve.
Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Saute remaining 1 clove garlic and collard greens until just tender, about 2 minutes.
Place cassava flour in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir until toasted, about 3 minutes. Stir in butter.
Serve feijoada with the collards-garlic mixture, toasted cassava flour, rice, orange wedges, and cilantro.

feijoada-saloia-with-poached-eggs-telecu.name: Feijoada Saloia With Poached Eggs

Then add the beans drained and add the water to it, just enough to form sauce. Let cook for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring from time to time. Retrieve the salt and season with some pepper.
Finally, lay the eggs on the beans, cover the pot and let them cook until they are to your liking. Add again the sausages cut into slices and the bacon in slices and serve very hot.

feijoada-soup-teleculinaria.name: Feijoada Soup

Peel the carrot and turnip, cut them into little pieces, as well as the cabbage, and add the vegetables to the soup.
