fig-toasties.name: Fig Toasties
instructions: Preheat oven to 250°. Mix jam, red pepper flakes, and vinegar in a small bowl; season with salt. Set half of spicy fig jam aside.

Spread 6 slices of bread with remaining spicy fig jam and top with cheddar and remaining 6 slices of bread. Spread outside of sandwiches with butter. Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Working in 2 batches, cook sandwiches, pressing down firmly, until golden brown and cheese is melted, about 1 minute per side. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a baking sheet and keep warm in oven until ready to serve.
Cut each sandwich into 4 triangles and serve with reserved spicy fig jam for dipping.

fig-goat-cheese-and-prosciutto-crostini.name: Fig, Goat Cheese, And Prosciutto Crostini
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C.
Slice 12 ½-inch slices of bread from the baguette. Place on a baking sheet, and brush generously with the olive oil. Sprinkle a little salt if desired on each slice.
Bake for about 10 mins, or until crisp and slightly golden. Remove from oven and cool slightly.
Spread goat cheese on each crostini. Spread about a tablespoon of Bonne Maman Fig Preserves on top of the goat cheese.
Fold the slices of prosciutto neatly and place on top of each crostini.
Lay fresh arugula leaves on top of each crostini to taste.

fig-prosciutto-bites.name: Fig-prosciutto Bites
instructions: Place goat cheese on a sheet of plastic wrap. Top with another sheet of plastic wrap and use a rolling pin to flatten into a 4x8-inch rectangle.

Remove the top sheet of plastic wrap and cover goat cheese with slices of prosciutto, slightly overlapping the edges. Cover prosciutto with a new sheet of plastic wrap and flip both sheets over so the goat cheese layer is now facing up.

Remove top sheet of plastic wrap. Cover goat cheese evenly with figs, basil, and black pepper. Starting from the long edge, roll tightly to form a log. Wrap log in plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 2 hours.

fig-ricotta-cake.name: Fig-ricotta Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 9x5-inch loaf pan with nonstick spray.
Whisk 1 1/2 cups flour, baking powder, and salt together in a medium bowl.

Beat ricotta cheese, sugar, and butter in a bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth, about 2 minutes. Beat in eggs, one at a time, followed by almond extract. Beat in flour mixture on low speed, scraping down the sides of the bowl until combined; beat batter for about 30 seconds more.
Place chopped figs into a bowl, sprinkle with 1 tablespoon flour, and stir to coat. Fold figs into batter, then pour into the prepared loaf pan. Place fig slices on top of batter, down the center.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, 45 to 60 minutes. Remove from the oven and place on a wire rack to cool, 20 to 30 minutes.
Remove cooled cake from the pan and dust with confectioners' sugar.

figgy-almond-polenta-tea-cake.name: Figgy Almond-polenta Tea Cake

ingredients.prep: room temperature, plus more for pan

ingredients.item: Instant polenta or fine-ground yellow cornmeal
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Lightly grease sides of a 9"-diameter cake pan with unsalted butter; line bottom with a parchment round. Stir 2 cups (200 g) almond flour, ⅔ cup (103 g) instant polenta or fine-ground yellow cornmeal, 2 tsp. baking powder, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 cup (200 g) sugar in a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on low speed until combined. Add 10 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, increase speed to medium-low, and beat until incorporated and no lumps remain, about 1 minute (it will look clumpy). Add 4 large eggs, zest of 1 large lemon, 1 cup sour cream (not low-fat), 2 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract, and ½ tsp. almond extract; beat, scraping down sides of bowl occasionally, until batter is smooth and fluffy, about 3 minutes (it’s okay if it looks curdled).

Scrape batter into prepared pan and smooth surface with an offset spatula or a spoon. Arrange 6–8 oz. fresh figs, trimmed, halved, cut side up, on top in even rows, pressing gently into batter. Sprinkle all over with remaining 2 tsp. (8 g) sugar. Bake cake until golden brown with no damp spots in the center and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 50–60 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan.

Run offset spatula or a butter knife around cake to release. Carefully invert onto a large plate, then invert again onto a cake plate or platter.
Do Ahead: Cake can be baked 1 day ahead. Store loosely covered at room temperature.

figs-with-bacon-and-chile.name: Figs With Bacon And Chile

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Cook bacon pieces in a large nonstick skillet over medium-low, stirring often, until brown and crisp, 8–10 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer bacon to a small bowl.

Pour off all but 2 Tbsp. fat from skillet; save for another use. Add maple syrup to skillet, swirling to combine, and heat over medium-high. Arrange figs in skillet in a single layer, cut side down. Cook, swirling liquid occasionally, until figs are slightly softened and caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Arrange figs cut side up on a platter and press pieces of bacon onto the surface of each fig.

Set the skillet over medium heat, add vinegar, and stir into juices. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring constantly, until syrupy, about 1 minute. Drizzle syrup over figs, then sprinkle with red pepper.

filet-mignon-for-two.name: Filet Mignon For Two

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 260°C (260 degrees C). Place a large, oven-proof skillet in the oven as it preheats.
Bring steaks to room temperature. Rub with olive oil and season generously with salt and pepper.
Remove the hot skillet from the oven carefully and place it on a burner set to high heat. Leave the oven on.
Place steaks into the dry pan immediately and sear, turning with tongs, 1 to 2 minutes on both sides.

Transfer the pan back into the preheated oven and cook until desired doneness is reached, 3 to 5 minutes. For medium doneness, an instant-read thermometer inserted into the centers should read 60°C (60 degrees C). Transfer steaks to a warm platter and tent loosely with foil. Let rest for 5 to 10 minutes; the steaks will continue to cook during this process and the internal temperature will rise 5 to 10 degrees.

Meanwhile, heat butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add shallot and garlic and saute until shallot is tender, 5 to 7 minutes. Pour in cream; let cook until reduced by half, about 10 minutes. Turn heat to low and add Gorgonzola cheese. Let cheese melt; season with salt and pepper. Serve sauce with steaks.

filet-mignon-with-bell-pepper-haystack-a.name: Filet Mignon With Bell Pepper Haystack And Fresh Guacamole Served With Corn Chips
instructions: Stir the avocado, roma tomatoes, minced shallot, jalapeno pepper, and lemon juice in a bowl. Chill in refrigerator to allow flavors to meld.
Place the chicken stock in a small saucepan over medium-low heat; simmer the stock until reduced to about 1/2 cup.

Heat 1/4 cup corn oil in a skillet over medium heat; cook the red bell pepper and yellow bell pepper in the hot oil until tender, 5 to 7 minutes. Stir the mushrooms into the peppers; season with the coriander seeds, sea salt, and black pepper. Add the reduced chicken stock and the water; cook and stir until the moisture has been absorbed, another 5 to 7 minutes. Transfer the mixture to a plate lined with paper towels to allow the grease to drain.

Heat the olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat; cook and stir the sliced shallots in the hot oil until softened, about 3 minutes. Stir in the crushed garlic and cook another 3 minutes. Pour 3 1/2 cups water over the mixture and bring to a boil; cook at a boil until the liquid reduces to 1 cup. Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh strainer and return the strained liquid to the saucepan, keeping it over medium heat. Add the white wine vinegar and return to a boil; continue cooking at a boil until the liquid reduced to about 1/4 cup. Quickly whisk in the chilled butter until just melted, whisking constantly. Remove from the heat and keep warm while you prepare the steaks.

Place a cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat and allow get hot. Heat the oil in the skillet. Cook the steaks in the hot oil until they start to firm, and are reddish-pink and juicy in the center, about 5 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 54°C (54 degrees C). Cover the meat with two layers of aluminum foil and allow to rest in a warm area for 10 minutes.

Place a mound of the bell pepper mixture into the center of each serving plate. Slice the rested steaks in half and place atop each mound. Spoon a few spoonfuls of the butter mixture onto the plate to surround the stack. Serve with the chilled guacamole and corn chips.

filipas-banana-muffins.name: Filipa’s Banana Muffins
instructions: 1Warm up the oven to 177°C (180°C) and line a muffin tray with paper muffin cases (or grease them with a bit of oil). Move the oven rack a notch down from the middle position.
Mash both bananas with a fork.
Combine the mashed up bananas with maple syrup or sugar and peanut butter in a medium-size bowl. Mix very well.
Add the dry ingredients and mix them well until there is no dry flour left.
Transfer the cake batter into the prepared muffin tray. Decorate the tops with slivered almonds (if using).
Bake for about 18 minutes, or until a toothpick comes out fairly clean.
Remove the muffins from the oven and allow them to cool down before eating.
Enjoy!

filipino-beef-giniling-afritada-style.name: Filipino Beef Giniling (afritada Style)
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add beef and 1/2 cup water; cook and stir until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Season with black pepper and add more water as needed; do not let beef dry out.
Add potatoes, carrots, and 3 tablespoons soy sauce; cook for 4 minutes, adding more water if mixture is too dry. Add raisins and cook for 2 to 3 minutes, again adding water as needed.

Pour in one can tomato sauce. Fill the can with water and swirl to remove excess sauce; pour into the saucepan. Stir in remaining 1/2 can sauce until combined. Add more water as needed to create a saucy but not soupy consistency.

Stir in bell pepper, sugar, and remaining 3 tablespoons soy sauce. Cook, stirring occasionally and adding water as needed so sauce does not dry out, until all vegetables are tender, about 3 to 5 minutes.

filipino-chicken-adobo.name: Filipino Chicken Adobo

ingredients.item: Palm sugar or light brown sugar

ingredients.prep: green parts only, thinly sliced on a diagonal (for serving)

instructions: Place chicken, garlic, chiles, ginger, vinegar, soy sauce, peppercorns, palm sugar, and bay leaves in a large reasalable plastic bag or 13x9" baking dish; toss to combine. Chill, turning chicken once, at least 2 hours and up to 2 days.

Heat oil in a medium heavy saucepan over medium. Add chicken, reserving marinade, and cook, turning occasionally and adjusting heat to medium-low if needed, until skin starts to brown and caramelize, 6–8 minutes. Add marinade and ½ cup water; bring to a simmer. Cover saucepan and cook 35 minutes. Uncover, turn chicken, and continue to simmer, turning chicken occasionally and adjusting heat if needed, until meat is very tender and liquid is reduced and starting to glaze, about 25 minutes.
Serve chicken over rice. Spoon sauce over, then top with scallions.

filipino-chicken-sisig-wraps.name: Filipino Chicken Sisig Wraps
instructions: In a pan on high heat, cook ground chicken on high until lightly browned. Once cooked, add  black pepper , soy sauce and salt.
Continue to stir until the chicken has absorbed juice and become golden-brown. To this, add chopped onion and jalapeño.
Let the onions cook slowly until about half done. At this point, add mayonnaise  and lemon juice into the mixture and mix well.
Garnish with chopped green onions, scoop into lettuce cups, garnish if desired, and serve.
Enjoy!

filipino-chicken-sopas.name: Filipino Chicken Sopas

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine water and onion in a pot and bring to a boil. Add chicken, garlic powder, and onion powder. Bring back to a boil and reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer broth until chicken thighs are tender, about 30 minutes.
Remove chicken and add carrots to the broth. Stir in 2 tablespoons fish sauce, chicken bouillon, and black pepper.

Shred chicken meat and discard bones; return meat to the broth and simmer until carrots are tender, about 10 minutes. Add macaroni; cook until tender, about 20 minutes, adding more water if needed. Stir in evaporated milk and butter; simmer until butter is melted. Add more fish sauce and season with salt and pepper to taste. Pour soup into serving bowls.

filipino-coconut-garlic-fried-rice-sinan.name: Filipino Coconut Garlic Fried Rice (sinangag)
instructions: Place rice in a large bowl with enough water to cover by a few inches; swirl with your fingers, then drain. Repeat until water runs clear, about 3 times.

Combine rice, 1 ½ cups water, coconut cream, turmeric, and salt in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, about 20 minutes. Chill, uncovered, 2 to 4 hours to overnight.

Heat coconut oil in a 12-inch skillet or wok over high heat. Add garlic; cook until it just begins to brown, about 1 minute. Add rice and spread in an even layer; cook, without stirring, until lightly browned and crisp on the bottom, about 4 minutes. Add fish sauce; cook, stirring, until fully combined and heated through, about 2 minutes.

filipino-embutido.name: Filipino Embutido

ingredients.item: Plus 1 0.5 teaspoons diamond crystal or 4 0.5 teaspoons morton kosher salt; plus more

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Gently lower 6 eggs into a large saucepan of boiling salted water and cook 5 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water and let cool 2 minutes. Drain and carefully peel.

Mix remaining 6 eggs in a large bowl with garlic, Parmesan, panko, butter, pickles, olives, raisins, vinegar, both paprikas, pepper, and 2 Tbsp. plus  1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 4½ tsp. Morton salt, then mix in pork.

Line two 9x5" loaf pans with a sheet of foil, leaving 3" overhang on long sides. Lightly coat with nonstick spray. Divide half of meat mixture between pans. Place 3 boiled eggs in a line down the center of each pan. Top with remaining meat mixture, packing tightly around eggs and making sure they are completely covered.

Mix ketchup and Worcestershire sauce in a small bowl and spread over both embutidos. Bake until an instant-read thermometer inserted into several places, avoiding eggs if possible, registers 155°, 55–70 minutes. Let cool 10 minutes.
Transfer embutidos to a platter; slice.
Do Ahead: Embutidos can be baked 4 days ahead. Let cool, cover and chill.

filipino-lechon-kawali.name: Filipino Lechon Kawali
instructions: Combine pork belly, garlic, bay leaves, salt, and pepper in a skillet; pour in enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until skin is tender, 35 to 45 minutes.
Drain and let sit at room temperature until pork has air-dried.
Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Fry pork in the hot oil, working in batches, until golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes.
Remove fried pork with a slotted spoon and drain on a paper towel-lined plate.

filipino-spaghetti.name: Filipino Spaghetti

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. orange edam cheese or cheddar cheese

instructions: Cook 1 lb. spaghetti in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook 4 beef hot dogs, sliced ½" thick, turning halfway through, until deep golden brown, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a plate.

Place 1 lb. ground pork in same pan; sprinkle with ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and ¼ tsp. freshly ground black pepper. Cook, breaking up meat and spreading across pan, until browned underneath, about 4 minutes. Stir meat, then continue to cook, stirring and breaking up more, until cooked through, about 2 minutes longer. Using slotted spoon, transfer pork to plate with hot dogs.

Combine 1 medium onion, finely chopped, 2 medium carrots, peeled, finely chopped, 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. freshly ground pepper in same skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is translucent and vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes. Add hot dogs and pork back to pan and stir to coat. Mix in 2¼ cups marinara sauce (about 24 oz.) and 1 cup banana ketchup or banana sauce, bring sauce to a simmer, and cook, stirring occasionally, until flavors come together, about 10 minutes. Mix in 1 tsp. granulated sugar; taste and season with more salt and pepper if needed. Remove pan from heat. Transfer 2 cups sauce to a small bowl; set aside.

Add spaghetti and 2 Tbsp. pasta cooking liquid to sauce in pan; toss, adding more pasta cooking liquid 1 Tbsp. at a time if needed, until noodles are well coated. Divide among plates and spoon reserved sauce over; top with 4 oz. orange Edam cheese or cheddar cheese, coarsely grated (about 1¼ cups), and 2 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about 1 cup).

filipino-style-barbecue-chicken.name: Filipino-style Barbecue Chicken
instructions: Make banana ketchup: Mash banana, tomato paste, vinegar, brown sugar, oil, ginger, onion powder, garlic powder, cayenne, salt, allspice, and turmeric together in a medium saucepan. Add water and stir to combine.

Place over medium-high heat and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until reduced and thickened, 7 to 10 minutes. Remove from heat; reserve 3 tablespoons for basting sauce, leaving about 1/2 cup for marinade.
Make chicken and marinade: Transfer ½ cup prepared banana ketchup to a large bowl and add lemon-lime soda, soy sauce, lemon juice, brown sugar, garlic, and black pepper. Whisk until combined.
Add halved chicken thighs to marinade and toss to coat. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate in the refrigerator for 4 to 18 hours.
When you are ready to cook chicken, make basting sauce: Whisk together reserved 3 tablespoons banana ketchup, soy sauce, brown sugar, oil, and fish sauce in a small bowl until smooth.

Preheat a charcoal grill until the coals are very hot. Remove chicken from the refrigerator and place on metal skewers, folding it in half with the smooth side facing outward and the rougher side folded inward.
Grill chicken in batches over hot coals until no longer pink in the centers, 15 to 20 minutes, turning and basting every 2 to 3 minutes.
Serve with accumulated juices or extra basting sauce.

filled-eggplant-roll-lezzet.name: Filled Eggplant Roll
instructions: 1. Wash and dry eggplants.
2. Celebrate longitudinally and fry in olive oil.
3. Peel the thin chopped onion and yellowish pan with very little olive oil addition.
4. Add and mix tomatoes and peppers very small.
5. Get from the stove and add and blend the chopped parsley.
6. Taste Tuzla.
7. Place the eggplant slice from the mortar and wrap it in the form of rolls.
8. Place it on the ground and serve.

filled-with-oatmeal-argiro.name: Filled With Oatmeal

ingredients.item: 1tomato peeled and finely chopped, with its juices
1tomato peeled and finely chopped, with its juices

instructions: Cut a slice of the tomatoes (we will then use it as a lid) and pour them out carefully leaving 1 cm of flesh around.
We grind in the blender the crumbs from the tomatoes and keep it aside for the finish of the food.
Sprinkle the inside of the empty vegetables with salt and proceed to the filling.

fillet-with-mushrooms-thyme-and-bay-leaf.name: Fillet With Mushrooms, Thyme And Bay Leaf
fillet-with-mushrooms-thyme-and-bay-leaf.original_name: Φιλέτο με μανιτάρια, θυμάρι και μαυροδάφνη

ingredients.item: 2 fillets of beef (parts) thickness 3 5 cm each
16 white manitas, cleaned and cut into thick slices
1 clone. fresh thyme or a little dry
2 fillets of beef (parts) thickness 3 5 cm each
16 white manitas, cleaned and cut into thick slices
1 clone. fresh thyme or a little dry

instructions: In a bowl rinse with cold water the dried mushrooms to remove dust, soil etc.
Cover them with boiling water, cover with a dish and allow them to swell and soften for 20 minutes.
In the meantime, in a deep pan or wide pot, heat the olive oil and add the fillets 1 minutes on each side.
Add the chopped onion and garlic until golden, for 2–3–1.
Add the cognac and allow 1 minute to 2 minutes to evaporate the alcohol.
Add the fresh mushrooms as well as the dried mushrooms, after draining them well with your hands.
Add the blackwash, 1 laurel, thyme and nutmeg.
Salt and rub a lot of pepper.
We turn the fillets (with a clamp, not a sharp object because the precious liquids will be lost).
Cover, lower the fire and simmer for 6'-7'.
Put the fillets on a platter and turn the fire on for 2–3 ́ until it rejuvenates (densates) and the sauce is glazed.
Pour the fillets and serve with potato mashed or green salad.

fillets-in-the-air-fryer-teleculinaria.name: Fillets In The Air Fryer
instructions: Shave the lemon peel and squeeze the juice. Season the fillets with salt, pepper, scrape and lemon juice, reserve. Undo the nut, add 2 spoons (soup) of the oil and mix well.
Forre a air fryer com papel vegetal anti-aderente para que fique com as laterais cobertas com o papel vegetal, de modo a fazer um "cesto".

Peel the onion, pinch it roughly and put it on air fryer. Clean the seed pepper, cut it into small pieces and add to the onion. Cut the bacon into strips and add it to the airfryer. Then water with the rest of the oil. Season with salt and pepper, add the oregano and wrap.
Set 180 degrees, for 10 minutes, mid-time open and stir.

After 10 minutes add the fillets and water them with the marinade. Program 180o for 10 minutes. Then cover with the bread and program 200o for 5 minutes. Sprinkle with chopped coriander and serve with cooked potatoes.

filo-pastry-pies-with-chicken-and-almond.name: Filo Pastry Pies With Chicken And Almonds
filo-pastry-pies-with-chicken-and-almond.original_name: Empadas de massa filo com galinha e amêndoas

ingredients.item: Salada de tomates-cereja, cebola roxa e salsa para acompanhar
Use good quality phylum mass because its lightness and crocance are essential.
Certifique-se de pincelar cada folha de massa com manteiga para garantir a textura perfeita.
Laminated almonds can be lightly toasted before using to enhance the flavor.
A salada de tomate-cereja, cebola roxa e salsa oferece um contraste refrescante e equilibrado ao prato principal.

instructions: Peel and cut the onion into thin slices as well as the leek. Hustle and pinch the garlic. Defray the chicken and book it.

Light a pot with the olive oil, add the onion, garlic and leek and let it shine. Add the chicken and involve. Remove the pot from the fire, add the almonds and chopped parsley, season with salt and pepper and wrap it all around. Reserve.

Cut the phylum leaves into squares, brush them with butter and overlay every three squares. Use each set to line the interior in small shapes. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 7 minutes.
Retire o tabuleiro do forno, recheie as formas com o preparado de galinha, deixe arrefecer um pouco e desenforme. Sirva com salada de tomate-cereja, cebola roxa e salsa.

filo-pastry-puffs-with-goat-cheese-telec.name: Filo Pastry Puffs With Goat Cheese
filo-pastry-puffs-with-goat-cheese-telec.original_name: Folhadinhos de massa filo com queijo de cabra
instructions: Start the oven at 180 degrees. Brush 4 sheets of phylum with melted butter and place them on each other. Repeat the operation until you get 5 sets.

Cut the chèvre cheese into slices, divide them into the leaves of pasta, wrap it in a tush and close the ends tightly, as you see in the photo. Brush with more melted butter, sprinkle with sesame seeds to taste and put them in the oven until they are golden.
Retire do forno, regue com o mel e sirva decorados a gosto e acompanhados com salada.

fine-crisp-cakes.name: Fine Crisp Cakes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
Beat butter in a large bowl with an electric mixer until creamy; beat in sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in egg yolk.
Whisk flour, allspice, and turmeric together in a bowl until well combined; sift into butter mixture and stir until dough is combined. Press dough into a 9-inch square baking dish.
Beat egg white in a small bowl; brush over dough.
Bake in the preheated oven until cake feels firm when lightly pressed in center, 30 to 45 minutes. Cut into squares while cake is still hot; cool in the baking dish.

fine-sweet-from-the-algarve-teleculinari.name: Fine Sweet From The Algarve
instructions: Crush the almond very well in a blender or food processor until you get a flour and book it. In a pot, put the sugar and some water, enough to absorb the sugar, light the light until boiling and let it boil for 2 to 3 minutes.
Then add the sieved ground almond and wrap it very well until you get a mixture without clumps. Remove from the fire and keep moving until it cools enough to shape with your hands.
Then, transfer the dough to a clean bench, knead well, make a ball and put it in a glass bowl. Cover with film and let rest, overnight.

The next day, divide the dough into small portions, use different food dyes depending on how you want to recreate them and mold them in shapes to taste (balls, squares, fruit shapes, shell, etc). Decorate with egg threads or taste and lead to cold until serving.

finger-licking-ribs.name: Finger Licking Ribs
instructions: Cut ribs into 1-rib pieces and toss with 1 teaspoon garlic powder. Brown half of ribs in hot oil in Dutch oven over medium-high heat; remove. Brown remaining ribs. Drain fat from pan. Return ribs to pan; stir 1/3 cup water, less sodium soy sauce, sherry and brown sugar. Cover and simmer 1 hour, or until ribs are done, stirring occasionally.

finger-licking-good-banana-fritters-pequ.name: Finger-licking Good Banana Fritters!
finger-licking-good-banana-fritters-pequ.original_name: Buñuelos de plátano ¡para chuparse los dedos!

ingredients.item: Extra virgin or virgin olive oil for frying

instructions: We ate the eggs, we add the molten butter, sugar and milk and we mix well. We put the flour and salt and the chemical yeast and cinnamon together and we mix them up. We cut the bananas into pieces, and they have to be at their best but they have to get soft. We put them into the mix.
We're frying for tands till they're golden.
We get out and leave them on a kitchen paper and get them to absorb the remaining oil. And we're still hot with sugar.

fingerling-potato-salad.name: Fingerling Potato Salad

ingredients.item: Kosher salt plus more for seasoning
Leeks (white and pale green parts only)
ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, cut crosswise into 1/4' slices (about 5 cups)

instructions: Place potatoes in a large pot. Add enough cold water to cover by 3". Stir in 1 tablespoon salt and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until potatoes are tender, about 10 minutes. Drain. Transfer to a large rimmed baking sheet and let cool slightly.

Heat 3 tablespoons oil in a small skillet over medium-high heat. Add mustard seeds to skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until seeds start to pop, about 2 minutes. Pour oil with seeds into a large bowl.
Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add leeks, season with salt, and cook, stirring occasionally, until just tender, 10-12 minutes.

Wisk 4 tablespoons oil, vinegar, Dijon mustard, and 1 tablespoon water into mustard-seed oil. Add potatoes and leeks; toss to coat. Season with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; chill. Return to room temperature before serving, adding more oil and vinegar if dry.

finnan-haddie-chowder.name: Finnan Haddie Chowder

ingredients.prep: unpeeled if new, and chopped into 3/4-1 1/4-inch cubes
drained, or 2 large corn on the cobs, kernels removed

instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the butter and oil, add the onion, and sauté over low heat for 5 minutes. Add the potatoes and cook for an additional 5 minutes. Add the thyme and wine and boil for a minute or so before pouring in the stock and stirring. Add the milk and bring to nearly boiling, then reduce the heat and simmer until the potatoes are almost tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the corn, finnan haddie, and a grinding of pepper and bring to a simmer. Let simmer until the haddock is just cooked, about 10 minutes. Taste for seasoning, adding a little salt if needed.

finnish-long-drink.name: Finnish Long Drink

ingredients.item: Fluid ounce freshly squeezed lemon juice

instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice. Add grapefruit soda, grapefruit juice, gin, and lemon juice; stir to combine.
Top with club soda, lightly stir again, and garnish with grapefruit slice.

finnish-oven-pancakes.name: Finnish Oven Pancakes
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Place an 11x13-inch baking pan into the oven.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Preheat the oven to 220 degrees C (218°C) with the pan in place.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Beat eggs in a large bowl with a wire whisk; add milk, lemon zest, white sugar, and salt and beat together.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Add flour and beat until mixture is very smooth. Mix in lemon juice until incorporated.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Place the butter into the preheated pan and allow it to melt until it is bubbling.'}
{'step': '6', 'description': 'Spread the butter over the entire bottom of the pan by rocking it back and fourth.'}
{'step': '7', 'description': 'Pour the batter in the buttered pan.'}
{'step': '8', 'description': 'Bake in the preheated oven until top of the pancake is lightly browned and puffed, 20 to 30 minutes.'}
{'step': '9', 'description': 'Mix coarse sugar and cardamom together and sprinkle over the top.'}
{'step': '10', 'description': 'Cut and serve.'}

finnish-pulla.name: Finnish Pulla
instructions: Warm milk in a small saucepan over medium heat until it bubbles, then remove from heat. Let cool until lukewarm.
Stir together warm water and yeast in a large bowl. Let stand until yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, about 5 minutes.

Stir lukewarm milk, sugar, 4 beaten eggs, salt, and cardamom into yeast mixture. Beat in 2 cups flour until combined. Add 3 cups flour and beat until dough is smooth and elastic. Add melted butter; beat until glossy. Mix in remaining flour until dough is stiff.
Transfer dough to a floured surface, cover with an inverted mixing bowl, and let rest for 15 minutes.

Knead dough until smooth and satiny, then place in a lightly greased mixing bowl and turn dough to coat. Cover with a dish towel; let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour. Punch down dough; let rise again until almost doubled, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (205 degrees C). Grease 2 baking sheets.

Turn dough out again onto a floured surface and divide into 3 equal pieces. Divide each piece into thirds. Roll each piece into a 12- to 16-inch strip. Braid 3 strips into a loaf to get 3 large, braided loaves.
Lift loaves onto the prepared baking sheets. Cover with a dish towel and let rise for 20 minutes.
Beat together 1 egg and water in a small bowl. Brush over loaves and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until the top is golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes. Check occasionally because the bottoms of loaves can burn quickly.

finnish-salmon-soup-lohikeitto-pequerece.name: Finnish Salmon Soup (lohikeitto)

ingredients.item: 500 g of fresh salmon (without skin and without thorns)
200 ml de nata para cocinar (crema de leche)
Eneldo o perejil fresco para decorar

instructions: First, we peel and cut the potatoes into small cubes. Then we clear the leek and carrot and cut them into thin cuts. We cut the onion and garlic teeth finely. Finally, we washed the salmon and cut them into pieces of bocado size.

In a big pot, we melt butter over medium heat. We add the onion and leg and garlic and we scattering them till they are tender and fragrant. Then we added carrot and potatoes and cook for a few more minutes, stirring occasionally.
Let's put the fish stock into the pot and add the bay leaf. We have been boiling, reducing fire and letting the vegetables cook with low heat for about 15- 20 minutes, or till they are tender.

We added the salmon pieces to the pot. We cook at low heat for about 5-7 minutes, or till the salmon is cooked and tender. Then we add the cream to the pot and remove well so that the soup has a creamy texture. We cook with low heat for a few more minutes so that all flavors blend well.

We sewed soup with salt and pepper to taste. We let them cook at low heat for a few more minutes so that all flavors will be integrated. We serve hot lohikeitto, decorated with some fresh dill or parsley above.

finnish-american-flatbread.name: Finnish-american Flatbread
instructions: Stir together warm water and sugar in a large bowl. Sprinkle yeast over the top and let stand until foamy, about 5 minutes.

Stir in whole wheat flour, rye flour, and salt. Mix in bread flour, 1 cup at a time, until dough is not sticky. Knead on a floured surface until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes. Place in an oiled bowl, turning to coat. Set aside to rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Punch down dough and divide into 4 or 5 portions. Form each portion into a ball; let rise again until doubled, about 20 minutes.
Place each ball onto a baking sheet and flatten out into an oval, 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick. Poke holes all over using the tines of a fork. Let rise again until doubled, 20 to 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until browned on the top and bottom, about 20 minutes. Brush the tops with melted butter while still warm.

fino-martini.name: Fino Martini
instructions: Combine 2 oz. gin and ¾ oz. fino sherry in a mixing glass with ice. Stir until thoroughly chilled, 30–40 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass and garnish with a lemon twist or olive.

fiorentini-with-butternut-squash.name: Fiorentini With Butternut Squash

ingredients.prep: from about 1/2 peeled medium squash; shredded with the coarse grating attachment on a food processor or on a box grater

ingredients.item: Fiorentini or other short curled pasta
Finely grated parmesan or grana padano plus more

instructions: Heat oil and butter in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add squash and sage and cook, stirring occasionally, until squash begins to brown, about 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain pasta, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid.

Add pasta and 1/2 cup pasta cooking liquid to squash and stir to coat. Cook over medium heat, stirring, adding more cooking liquid as needed, until sauce coats pasta. Stir in 1/2 cup Parmesan. Divide pasta among bowls; top with more Parmesan.

fiori-di-sicilia-pound-cake.name: Fiori Di Sicilia Pound Cake

ingredients.prep: weighing roughly 200 g, in their shells
preferably european, melted and slightly cooled

ingredients.item: The grated zest of 1 lemon or orange

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C. Butter and flour a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.

Separate the eggs and let them come to room temperature. In a good-sized mixing bowl, whisk the egg yolks to break them up a bit. Add the sugar and whisk until they are thick and pale. Add the melted butter, vanilla, fiori di Sicilia extract, and lemon zest and whisk until smooth. Add the flour and stir with a rubber spatula until no streaks remain.

Using electric beaters or in a stand mixer, beat the egg whites until they form soft peaks. Add the salt and beat until they form stiff peaks. Stir a quarter of the whites into the yolk mixture to lighten it. Then gently fold the remaining egg whites into the batter.

Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center of the cake comes out nearly clean. Allow the cake to cool for 10 minutes in the pan, then remove to a wire rack.
Serve at room temperature. If not eating the cake until later, allow it to cool all the way to room temperature, then wrap it in plastic and store at room temperature.

fire-roasted-cherry-tomato-salsa.name: Fire-roasted Cherry Tomato Salsa

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and brush with olive oil.
Spread tomatoes, onion, garlic, and jalapeño peppers onto prepared baking sheet.
Cook under the preheated broiler for 5 minutes. Turn the baking sheet and continue broiling until vegetables are charred, about 5 minutes more. Cool slightly.
Remove garlic from skins; discard skins.

Blend tomatoes, onion, peeled garlic, jalapeños, any accumulated juices from the baking sheet, cilantro leaves, lime juice, cumin, cayenne pepper, and oregano in a blender until salsa is smooth. Transfer to a bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until flavors blend, at least 2 hours. Season with salt and black pepper.

fire-roasted-corn-and-beef-skillet-pie.name: Fire-roasted Corn And Beef Skillet Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Cook ground beef, stirring and breaking up lumps, in a large cast iron skillet until browned, about 10 minutes. Stir in pasta sauce and corn. Bring to a boil, then stir in cheese.
Unroll breadstick dough and loosely weave on top of filling.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown and bubbly, 20 to 25 minutes. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.

fire-roasted-corn-salsa.name: Fire-roasted Corn Salsa
instructions: Combine tomatoes, onion, cilantro, lime juice, and cumin in a large bowl.
Preheat an outdoor grill to medium heat and lightly oil the grate.
Coat corn and jalapeno peppers with olive oil.
Place corn and jalapenos on the preheated grill and cook, turning every 3 minutes, until corn is charred, about 15 minutes total. Transfer to a cutting board and let cool 5 minutes.
Dice jalapenos and cut corn kernels from the cob. Add jalapenos and corn kernels to the bowl of tomato-onion mixture; stir until well combined. Season with salt and pepper.

fireball-horchata-pops.name: Fireball® Horchata Pops
instructions: Grind rice finely using a coffee or spice grinder. Transfer to a large bowl; add cinnamon sticks. Pour in warm water. Cover with plastic wrap and let sit, 8 hours to overnight.

Strain rice mixture through a sieve set over a bowl. Press against the rice with a wooden spoon to squeeze out as much liquid as possible; discard rice. Stir rice milk and sugar into strained liquid to make horchata.
Measure 2 1/2 cups horchata into another bowl. Add cinnamon whiskey, cayenne pepper, and 1/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon. Pour into ice pop molds.
Freeze until solid, at least 12 hours.
Run molds under warm water to release ice pops. Sprinkle with an additional dash of cinnamon before serving.

firebird-chicken.name: Firebird Chicken
instructions: Combine habanero peppers, garlic, and salt in a mortar and pestle; mash into a fine paste. Whisk in Sriracha and egg to combine; set aside.
Remove tenderloins from breasts; slice each remaining breast in half lengthwise, cutting at a 45-degree angle to create two relatively equal strips.
Place all 6 chicken strips on a plate; generously dust all sides with rice flour until completely covered.

Pour habanero mixture over chicken strips using tongs to make sure each chicken strip is evenly coated and that there are no dry spots. Wrap the plate in plastic wrap; marinate in the refrigerator 2 to 12 hours.
Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken; cook until well browned and no longer pink in centers, about 3 minutes per side. Serve immediately.

firecracker-chicken.name: Firecracker Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Place a rack in the center of the oven.
Combine cornstarch, ginger, pepper, and 1 teaspoon salt in a large bowl. Place beaten eggs in a separate large, shallow bowl. Add chicken to cornstarch mixture and toss to coat.
Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high until shimmering.
While oil is heating, transfer 1/3 of the chicken to dish with eggs and toss to coat.

Use a slotted spoon to transfer chicken to the hot skillet and cook in hot oil, turning once, until chicken is golden on both sides, about 2 minutes per side (chicken will not be cooked through at this point). Transfer to a 9x13-inch baking dish. Repeat with remaining chicken, adding 1 tablespoon of oil to the skillet per new batch (3 batches total).
Stir together honey, hot sauce, vinegar, crushed red pepper, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt in a bowl. Pour over chicken in the baking dish and stir to coat.

Bake in the preheated oven until chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, stirring halfway through, 25 to 30 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of the chicken should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Serve over rice and sprinkle with scallions and sesame seeds.

firecracker-salmon.name: Firecracker Salmon
instructions: Combine 1/4 cup maple syrup, 1/2 of the jalapeño pepper, garlic, vinegar, salt, and black pepper in a mini food processor or small blender jar; blend until smooth.

Place salmon fillets in a gallon-sized resealable plastic bag. Pour marinade on top, seal, and refrigerate for 20 minutes. Remove from refrigerator and let the bag sit at room temperature for 10 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Remove salmon from marinade and pat dry. Place salmon on the prepared baking sheet and season with additional salt and pepper. Slice remaining jalapeno pepper thinly and place on top of salmon.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Brush 2 teaspoons maple syrup onto the fillets and return to the hot oven. Bake until fish flakes easily with a fork, an additional 3 to 5 minutes.

firehouse-chicken.name: Firehouse Chicken
instructions: Purée garlic, vinegar, olive oil, salt, parsley, paprika, pepper, and ½ cup vegetable oil in a blender until smooth. Place chicken in a large resealable plastic bag and pour marinade over. Seal bag and chill chicken 1–3 days.
Remove chicken from marinade and pat dry with paper towels. Let sit uncovered at room temperature 1 hour.

Preheat oven to 400°. Heat remaining ½ cup vegetable oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium heat. Place 1 chicken half, skin side down, in skillet, set another skillet or heavy pot on top, and add a couple of cans to weigh it down. Cook until skin is browned and crisp, 15–20 minutes. Transfer chicken to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining chicken half.

Roast chicken in oven, skin side up, until cooked through and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of thigh registers 165°, 20–25 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 15 minutes before slicing.

firehouse-chili-and-cornbread-casserole.name: Firehouse Chili And Cornbread Casserole
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over high heat. Add ground beef, onion, and salt. Cook and stir with a wooden spoon or spatula until meat is browned and crumbled into small pieces, about 5 minutes. Stir in flour and cook for 2 minutes. Add poblano pepper, garlic, chili powder, cumin, black pepper, cayenne, and oregano; cook, stirring, for 2 to 3 minutes.

Stir in diced tomatoes and crushed tomatoes. Measure water using the empty tomato cans and pour into the pot. Bring to a simmer, stirring occasionally, then reduce heat to medium-low. Let simmer, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes before stirring in kidney beans. Continue simmering until bubbling and fragrant, about 30 minutes more. Taste for seasoning and adjust.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place a deep 9x13-inch baking dish on a baking sheet. Transfer chili to the dish, being sure to leave at least 1 inch of space at the top. Stir to evenly distribute.

Make crust: Whisk together corn muffin mix, 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese, milk, and eggs in a large bowl until smooth. Spoon batter evenly over chili until the surface is covered. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cornbread crust is browned and a toothpick inserted into crust comes out clean, about 30 minutes.
Spoon or ladle into a dish and garnish with sour cream and cilantro.

firehouse-cornbread-by-the-3s.name: Firehouse Cornbread By The 3s
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Lightly grease a 15x10x2-inch baking pan.
Whisk flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl; stir in milk, vegetable oil, and eggs until batter is evenly combined. Pour batter into prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center of the loaf comes out clean, about 33 minutes.

Cook in the hot oil until vegetables begin to brown, about 10 minutes; stir in kielbasa and continue to cook until sausage is heated through. Stir mustard seeds into cabbage mixture; season to taste with salt and black pepper. Stir chopped kluski into the mixture.
Pour eggs over the noodle mixture and stir until eggs are set, 3 to 5 minutes.

fireplace-eggnog.name: Fireplace Eggnog
instructions: Add 8 oz. whole milk and 4 oz. heavy cream to a small saucepan, bring to a simmer over medium heat, then reduce heat to low (you want the mixture to be about 140°). Turn ½ vanilla bean inside out and add to the saucepan with 1 tsp. loose smoky tea. Simmer to infuse flavor, about 10 minutes. Strain milk mixture into a liquid measuring cup, then let cool about 5 minutes.

Crack 4 large eggs into a small bowl to make sure there are no shards of shell, then add to a blender and blend on low to medium-low until very frothy, about 3 minutes. Add milk mixture and ½ cup demerara sugar and blend until sugar is fully dissolved, about 2 minutes. Slowly add 4 oz. high-proof bourbon, 2 oz. aged rum, and 2 oz. tawny port and continue to blend on medium-low until everything is fully integrated and mixture is frothy and aerated, about 5 minutes.

Transfer mixture to a resealable jar or bottle and allow to cool in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours. Eggnogs can age for several months when properly stored in the refrigerator in an airtight container with as little headroom as possible.
* Raw egg is not recommended for the elderly, pregnant women, people with weakened immune systems…or people who don’t like raw egg.

fish-curry.name: Fish Curry

ingredients.prep: tilapia, or cod), cut into 2" pieces

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Combine fish, salt, chile powder, and turmeric in a medium bowl and, using your hands, gently toss fish to evenly coat in spices.

Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Working in batches to avoid crowding, cook fish pieces until lightly browned, about 2 minutes per side (the fish won’t be cooked all the way through). Transfer fish to a plate.

Heat grapeseed oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add a few mustard seeds to pot. When seeds start to wiggle and pop, reduce heat to medium and add curry leaves (if using), asafetida (if using), and remaining mustard seeds. Cover pot and cook spices, swirling, until mustard seeds start popping more gradually, about 30 seconds. Uncover pot and return heat to medium-high. Add ginger and garlic and cook, stirring constantly, until beginning to brown, about 1 minute. Add chopped onion and a big pinch of salt and cook, stirring often and reducing heat if needed to prevent burning, until onion is golden brown and jammy, 7–9 minutes.

Stir in turmeric, then tomatoes and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium and cook, stirring often, until tomatoes are glossy and darkened in color and oil starts to separate around edges of pot, 5–7 minutes.
Add coconut milk and broth and stir to combine; season with salt. Bring curry to a simmer, then reduce heat to medium-low. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking, 10 minutes.
Add fish to curry. Return to a gentle simmer and cook until fish is just cooked through and flakes easily with a fork, about 4 minutes. Taste and season with more salt if needed.

Divide fish curry among bowls. Top with sliced red onion and cilantro. Serve with rice and lime wedges for squeezing over.

instructions: Eliminate the ends of the green bean and then cut it in half, vertically. Cook it in salt-tempered water for 4 minutes after boiling. Drain and let it cool.

In a bowl, mix the flour with baking powder and oil. Season with salt and pepper and add the beer and lemon juice. Beat it very well with a wire rod, adding the eggs one by one. Let it rest for 30 minutes.
After the time indicated, pass the green beans, one by one, through the anterior pollum and fry in hot oil. Drain on absorbent paper and serve.

fish-from-the-garden-with-pumpkin-sauce-.name: Fish From The Garden With Pumpkin Sauce
fish-from-the-garden-with-pumpkin-sauce-.original_name: Peixinhos da horta com molho de abóbora

ingredients.item: 150 ml of water with very cold gas

instructions: Get the green bean, eliminate the wires and keep it whole. Cook it in salt-tempered water, then drain well and let it cool.
Wipe the flour into a bowl, add a pinch of salt, eggs and olive oil and mix, adding the water in thread. Stir well until you get a homogeneous, lumpless pole.
Pass the beans, one by one, through the cream and fry in warm and abundant oil. When you take it off, put it on absorbent paper and reserve.

Prepare the sauce: take the pumpkin to the oven, preheated at 180°C, until roasted, then reduce it puree and wrap it with cream cheese, salt, pepper, cinnamon and fresh ginger grated to taste. Put it in a sauce and sprinkle it with poppy seeds. Serve with the little fish in the garden.

fish-from-the-garden-with-tartar-sauce-t.name: Fish From The Garden With Tartar Sauce
fish-from-the-garden-with-tartar-sauce-t.original_name: Peixinhos da horta com molho tártaro
instructions: In a bowl put the flour and water with gas previously seasoned with salt and pepper. Involve very well until you get a homogeneous pole.

Fix the green beans by removing the ends and wires, wash and drain. Light a frying pan with abundant oil and let it warm well. Pass one green bean at a time through the previous pepper and fry them in the hot oil. Remove and let it run on absorbent paper.

Now prepare the tartar sauce: peel the egg and pinch it finely, as well as pickles and a little parsley. Mix the mayonnaise with the egg, pickles and a little parsley, mix everything well and season with salt and pepper. Serve the little fish in the garden with this sauce.

fish-gratin-with-mayonnaise-teleculinari.name: Fish Gratin With Mayonnaise
instructions: Peel and cut the potatoes in half. Cook them in salted water for 20 minutes. Drain them, reduce them to puree, add 2 spoons (soup) from mayonnaise and stir. Spread half on a board and book the rest.
Season the fillets with little salt, then bar them with 2 spoons (soup) of mayonnaise, pass them for grated bread and place them on the puree.
Lave os pimentos, corte-os ao meio, retire-lhes as sementes e corte-os em cubos. Deite-os numa tigela, junte a restante maionese e misture.

Lay the previous mixture on the fillets. Place the remaining mashed potatoes in the four corners of the board, helping yourself with a pastry bag. Decorate with the olives and take them in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 20 minutes. Remove and serve.

fish-in-puff-pastry-lezzet.name: Fish In Puff Pastry
instructions: 1. Cut mezgit fills cube cube cube.
2. Add 2 cups of milk to a pot and chopped fish meats.
3. Cook until the meat is softened.
4. melt Margarini in a small pan.
5. Add 2 spoons and roast.
6. Add 1 cup of milk.
7. Cook and cook it from the stove until it is dark.
8. Add the mixture to the pot where fish meats are cooked.
9. Add salt, pepper and mix and cook the pot.
10. Share the square legumes into the flat floor and the middle of the material you prepared.
11. 11. Take the yellow of the egg from the white.
12. Remove the acne from the edges of the milfe and close it in the form of bohça.
12. August Index the dough into the oven tray.
14 July Remove the egg yolks and rub them.
15. Bake for 25 minutes in the oven with a pre-heated 180 degree and serve hot.

fish-in-the-air-fryer-teleculinaria.name: Fish In The Air Fryer
instructions: Season the fish with chopped garlic teeth, sweet pepper, white wine, lemon juice, salt and pepper.
Descasque a cebola e corte-a em meias-luas; corte os tomates em rodelas; limpe o pimento de sementes e corte em tiras.
Cut 4 rectangles of aluminum foil. In the center of each, have the onion, tomato, half the pepper, a fish pitch and the rest of the pepper. Water with the olive oil and close the cartons.
Put it on air fryer, program at 200o for 20 minutes.
Retire os papelotes, abra-os e sirva com uma salada a gosto.

fish-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Fish In The Oven
instructions: We ask the fisherman to clean the fish.
Salt it around and keep it in the refrigerator, in a colander, covered with a fresh towel until we use it.
We clean the leeks. Remove the green part (we will use it in broths or soups in another recipe).
Cut their tender part into pieces, the size of a bite.
Clean and cut the onions into six thick slices.
Peel and cut the potatoes in size.
Clean and cut the carrots into thick slices.
Finally cut the finocchio into medium slices.
Preheat the ocean to 200°3 in resistance.
Place all vegetables on a baking pan.
Sauté them and pour them with the olive oil.
Add the laurel and thyme.
Mix them well and bake for about 35 to 40 minutes, until they soften and start to dark.
After the vegetables are half baked, we remove the baking pan from the oven.
Place the fish in the middle of the baking pan by going down to gather the vegetables around and under the fish.
Pour with the wine and sprinkle with the fingers with some water.
Cover with parchment paper and then seal with aluminum foil well around the baking pan.
Continue baking for about 30 minutes.

fish-kidney-ala-cream-with-mushrooms-arg.name: Fish Kidney Ala Cream With Mushrooms

ingredients.item: 1 large fishnet 500 gr (cut into thick slices)
A little chopped parsley for serving
1 large fishnet 500 gr (cut into thick slices)
A little chopped parsley for serving

instructions: We choose a large fishnet and cut it into thick slices.
Heat the olive oil in a large pan with a thick base. Add the fishnet to high heat on both sides for about 4-5 minutes, until it makes a nice crust.
Remove the meat from the pan and keep it warm, covered on a platter.
In the same pan, add the bacon and add it to a high heat for 1 minute until it is crispy.
Transfer to a plate lined with kitchen paper to drain the excess fat. We don't cover it while it's warm so it stays crispy.
Add the mushrooms and broken garlic to the same pan.
Sauté over high heat for 2-3 minutes without mixing. We want them to cook mostly and not make any liquids. One shot to the pan will do. We remove them and keep them apart.
In the same pan, add the broth, balsamic cream, cream and parmesan.
Lower the heat to medium temperature, even if the sauce is boiling.
Add salt and pepper and simmer for about 2 minutes until it thickens slightly.
We return the fishnet to the pan along with the liquids it has taken out on the platter.
Add the sauteed mushrooms and plums and let them all bottle together for 2 more minutes, until the sauce is well seasoned.
The fish negrore is always served warm, ideal with rice or mashed potatoes.
Garnish the dish with chopped parsley and sprinkle with the crisp bacon.

fish-kidney-with-chestnut-puree-argiro.name: Fish Kidney With Chestnut Puree

ingredients.item: 1/4 cup of balsamic vinegar with honey
1 kg chestnuts cleaned (we can also use ground chestnuts)
1/4 cup of balsamic vinegar with honey
1 kg chestnuts cleaned (we can also use ground chestnuts)

instructions: We clean the nerves first from the fishnet.
With a baking string, tie each piece per 4 cm, depending on its size. After tying all the fish pits, cut them into a pendant to keep their shape during cooking.
Heat the olive oil in a deep pan with lid.
Salt and pepper the meat and brown it over high heat for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Add the dried fruit.
Add the wine, balsamic and cognac. Allow the liquids to evaporate and then add the broth and thyme.
Turn the pendants with tweezers and simmer until the sauce is glazed and thickened. She's ready when big blisters show up.

fish-kidney-with-mustard-and-yogurt-argi.name: Fish Kidney With Mustard And Yogurt

ingredients.item: 800 grish nefris cut into thick slices
800 grish nefris cut into thick slices

instructions: Cut the fish nephri knife into thick slices.
Press lightly with the palm spreading the pendants.
Add salt and pepper.
Brush a baking pan with minimal olive oil.
Place the pendants inside and sprinkle with minimal olive oil.

fish-kidney-with-semolina-argiro.name: Fish Kidney With Semolina
instructions: Cut the fishnet into strips and add to the bowl.
Add 1 tablespoon olive oil, lemon juice, garlic.
Cover the bowl and leave it in the refrigerator for 1 hour, marinate.
Soak the oatmeal in a bowl with cold water for 15 minutes.
Then drain it well, remove all liquids.
In a large saucepan, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil.
Add the marinated meat and simmer for about 8 minutes until it is well cooked.
We put it on a platter and keep it warm.
Add the remaining oil (1 tablespoon), mushrooms and fresh onions to the same pan and leave them for 2'-3' to wilt.
Add the tomatoes and oatmeal and leave them for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle the herbs, put the meat back in the pan.
Add salt and pepper and serve.

fish-kidney-with-sweet-and-sour-glaze-ar.name: Fish Kidney With Sweet And Sour Glaze

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons orange juice and 1 piece of peel (to be uncorned)
2 tablespoons orange juice and 1 piece of peel (to be uncorned)

instructions: Leave the meat for 30 minutes on the kitchen counter.
With a sharp knife, clean the fishnet from fibers, membranes and fat.
Place in bowl the ingredients of the glaze: honey, sugar, juice, orange peel, brandy, cinnamon, clove, nutmeg and cayenne pepper.
Add the ingredients to the baking bowl and mix with a spoon.
Spread the solid materials on a baking pan or tray.
Tampon the meat very well with absorbent paper to dry.
Then roll a fishnet into the solid materials until it is completely covered (i.e., fry as flour a meat for frying) and shake off the unnecessary baking.
In a non-stick pan, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil and in medium to high heat, add the pans for 7 to 10 minutes, until they make a nice crust and have a nice color around.
We make sure we don't stick them together.
After they're pink, we put them on a platter.
Remove any fat from the pan and add the ingredients of the glaze over medium heat.
Rub the bottom so the caramelized juices of the meat can deflavour.
Simmer for 2 minutes until halved.
We hold 2 tablespoons of glaze for later and put the meat on a grill in a baking pan.
With a brush, garnish around each fish nefrie, all of it.
Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C, in residence, for about 12 to 15 minutes.
Add the two fish-freaks and continue baking for 5 minutes.
Once they are removed from the oven, brush once more with the glaze and allow them to stand for 10 minutes.
Add the honey and mustard and mix well.
Add 1 tablespoon to the mustard glaze.
Add the meat into a cutting wood and cut it into thick slices (medaillon).
Serve with the rest of the glaze on the table.

fish-liver-with-pasta-argiro.name: Fish Liver With Pasta
instructions: Clean the fishnet and cut it into thin slices, then into stripes.
Heat the olive oil in a plate pot and sauté the fish-nefrey for 3-4 minutes until golden.
Add the onion and leek and sauce for 2-3 minutes.
Then add the mushrooms and let them absorb their liquids.
Add the tomatoes cut in half, grated carrot and garlic and sauce for 2-3 minutes.
Pour hot water or white dry wine.
Add the herbs, rub a lot of pepper and simmer for 15 minutes until the sauce thickens well.
Dilute the yogurt in a bowl with some of the sauce and pour it into the pan with the rest of the ingredients.
Boil the taliatelles in salted boiling water for 6 minutes.
As soon as they drain, add them to the sauce and boil on high heat for 1-2 minutes.
Remove from heat, add the cheese and mix well.
Serve the pasta immediately with the fillets of fish nefri, warm and aromatic.

fish-loin-with-plums-and-wine-argiro.name: Fish Loin With Plums And Wine

ingredients.item: 1 kg fishnet (pig fillet) cut into locket
1 kg fishnet (pig fillet) cut into locket

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pot or deep pan.
Add the meat and brown for 2 minutes on each side.
Add the onion and garlic hole, and saute for 2 to 3 minutes until the onion becomes clear.
Add the plums to the pan and mix.
Add the wine and cognac and add the thyme, the laurel and the spice.
Cover the pot and simmer for about 20 minutes.
Add the cream, salt, pepper and boil over high heat for a few more minutes.
Serve with velvety potato mashed potatoes: spread the meat with sauce and plums over it.

fish-manchu-lezzet.name: Fish Manchu
instructions: 1. Onions are chopped.
2.  Tavaya oils are taken and onions are roasted in oil.
3.   Salt and red pepper are added to the onions starting to take color.
4. Fish are cleaned and divided into two-finger-width slices.
5.   fish are placed in the medicine and onions are added.
6. The water is added and the cover is closed.
7.   It is cooked and served for 5 minutes by adding vinegar and salt to fish.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

fish-meatballs-argiro.name: Fish Meatballs

ingredients.item: 800 grievous fish fillet (bacal or roof or hammer etc.)
800 grievous fish fillet (bacal or roof or hammer etc.)

instructions: Heat the oil first and sauté the vegetarians to soften.
Add the paste and bake for 1-2 minutes. Let them cool.
Chew the fish in a bowl.
Add the cold sauteed ingredients, as well as all other ingredients.
Add the toast until the mixture is formed, about 1 cup.
We knead well and make meatballs.
Place them in the oil for 1-2 minutes on each side.
Remove the fish meatballs on absorbent paper.
Add the tomatoes to the pan with the oil.
Add salt and pepper and boil 10 minutes.
Add the fish meatballs again and let them boil for 7-8 minutes until the sauce thickens.
Sprinkle with parsley and serve with pilafi rice.

fish-meatballs-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Fish Meatballs - Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 lata pequena de tomate pelado em cubos

instructions: Prepare the meatballs: clean the fish of skin and spines and crush it in a chipper. Lay in a bowl and add the previously chopped onion and garlic. Add the egg, grated bread and parsley, season with salt and pepper and knead until it is well connected. Mold small balls with this prepared and book.
Descasque e pique a cebola e os alhos e aloure-os num tacho com o azeite. Junte o tomate pelado e deixe cozinhar, envolvendo. Quando o tomate estiver macio, tempere com sal e pimenta e mexa.
Add the meatballs to the sauce, wrap carefully, cover and let cook. In the end, add the basil, cut into pieces, and serve with accompaniment to taste.

fish-meatballs-in-sauce-and-healthy-pequ.name: Fish Meatballs In Sauce ( And Healthy)
fish-meatballs-in-sauce-and-healthy-pequ.original_name: Albóndigas de pescado en salsa (fáciles y saludables)

ingredients.item: 450 g de pescado blanco (merluza, rosada, pescadilla...)

instructions: We cut fish and onions into pieces we put into a bowl. We add padded bread, salt and pepper
Trituramos hasta obtener una pasta.
Con las manos formamos bolitas que reservamos.
We clear our mushrooms and steamed them up and we scattering them into a saucer with some extra virgin olive oil
Incorporamos el tomate triturado, y cuando rompa a hervir, bajamos el fuego y dejamos cocinar unos diez minutos.
We put in fish meatballs, they have to be covered with tomato, and we let them cook another ten minutes.

fish-medallions-in-the-oven-teleculinari.name: Fish Medallions In The Oven
instructions: Place the chips on a tray, season them with salt and put them in the oven, preheated at 180°C.
When the chips are baked, cover them with the onions, cut into half-moons, and the garlic chopped. Have the fish on top, place a lemon slice on each medallion and season with salt and pepper.
Water with the olive oil and put it in the oven at the same temperature for about 20 minutes. In the end, sprinkle with mint chopped and serve.

fish-medallions-with-shrimp-teleculinari.name: Fish Medallions With Shrimp
instructions: Season the fish medallions with salt and reserve. Peel and peel the onion and garlic; peel the skin and seeds from the tomato and cut it into cubes; cut the leek into half-moons; peel the shrimps, leaving their head and tail, make a slight cut on the loin and remove their guts.

Take a frying pan to the fire with the olive oil and the blond and let it warm. Add the onion and garlic, add the shrimps, season with salt and pyri and let it blush. Add the tomato, leek and fish and cook it on both sides. Water with the white wine and let it boil.
Acrescente o creme de marisco, mexendo bem, assim como os coentros grosseiramente picados. Envolva, retire do lume e transfira para um prato.

Prepare the rice: aloure the chopped onion in the olive oil, then add the rice and stir. Let it cook a little, add the water to boil, salt and saffron and cook for about 10 minutes. Finally, wrap the raisins and serve as a side of the medallions.

fish-milanese.name: Fish Milanese

ingredients.prep: boneless gray sole or flounder fillets (about 1 0.5 pounds total)

instructions: Cook cilantro in a medium pot of boiling salted water until wilted, about 20 seconds. Drain and transfer cilantro to a bowl of ice water. Swish around in water to cool. Drain, then squeeze excess liquid from herbs with your hands.

Purée cilantro, ginger, and 2 Tbsp. water in a blender until almost smooth. With motor running, gradually stream in oil and blend until smooth. Strain cilantro oil through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl; discard any solids. Mix lime juice into oil and season with salt.
Do Ahead: Cilantro oil (without lime juice and salt) can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before adding lime juice and salt.

Process panko in a food processor until very finely ground (it will only take 45–60 seconds). Transfer to a shallow bowl. Place egg yolks in another shallow bowl and whisk in buttermilk. Place cornstarch in a third shallow bowl. Line a rimmed baking sheet with paper towels and set a wire rack inside.

Working with 1 fillet at a time, season with kosher salt on both sides and dredge in cornstarch, shaking off excess. Dip in egg mixture, letting excess drip back into bowl, then coat in panko, pressing to adhere before shaking off excess. Repeat steps to make a second coating. Place on a rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining fillets.

Pour oil into a large heavy skillet, preferably cast iron, to come 1" up sides. Heat oil over medium-high until an instant-read thermometer registers 350°–365° (Don’t let the tip of the thermometer touch the bottom of the skillet). Carefully lower a fillet along the side of skillet closest to you and let slide away from you into oil. Carefully swirl oil in skillet and cook fish just until golden on the bottom, about 2 minutes. Using a fish spatula or slotted spoon, carefully turn fish over and cook until golden on the other side, about 2 minutes. Transfer fish to wire rack in prepared baking sheet and season with sea salt while still hot. Repeat with remaining fillets.
Toss cucumbers, fennel, onion, chile, cilantro oil, and a pinch of kosher salt in a medium bowl and top with some cilantro.
Serve fish with cucumber ceviche and lime wedges.

fish-moqueca-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Fish Moqueca Recipe
instructions: Season the fish with salt, pepper and lemon juice. Peel and pinch the onions and garlic. Clean the seed peppers and cut them into small cubes.
Aloure a cebola e os alhos, num tacho com o azeite e o louro. Acrescente o tomate escorrido e deixe reduzir um pouco.
Add the coconut milk and fish broth, let it lift boiling and add the fish. Season with salt, pepper, saffron and soy sauce and stir.
De seguida, adicione os pimentos e mexa. Retifique os temperos, retire do lume, polvilhe com os coentros picados e sirva, de imediato, com arroz branco.

fish-nuggets-in-mycook-pequerecetas.name: Fish Nuggets In Mycook

ingredients.item: 400 g de pescado blanco sin espinas ni piel (p.ej. merluza)

instructions: We remove the skin from the hake and cut it into pieces, put into the Mycook's glass, add the garlic and put it at velocity 7 for 10 seconds in manual mode.
The scatula put down the pieces of fish from the walls of the glass. We add the cream cheese, milk, bread crumbling, a pint of salt and pepper and put another 10 seconds at Speed 7 in manual mode.

We remove the mass from the Myscook glass and with our hands slightly moist we form balls with the mass of fish. Once we have formed the balls, we have slightly crushed them and put them into nuggets with our hands, and we have been put out with about 18 nuggets, depending on how big they are.

Disponemos 3 boles, uno con la harina, otro con los huevos batidos y otro con el pan rallado y vamos pasando los nuggets en ese orden por cada uno de ellos, hasta que acabemos de rebozar todos los nuggets de pescado.

We put to heat abundant olive oil and fry nuggets into small tands for about 4 minutes on each side until they are golden. That's how we get them out. We put them on a plate with paper and kitchen to get them to absorb their spare oil.
Once all nuggets are ready we serve them with our preferred garrison, children like to accompany them with cucumbers and a tzatziki dip to wet.

fish-omelette-with-tomato-teleculinaria.name: Fish Omelette With Tomato
instructions: Cut out the delights of the sea in circles. In a separate bowl beat the eggs with milk, season them with salt and pepper and beat them a little more. Reserve.
Lave a salsa e pique-a finamente. Reserve.

Melt half the butter. Pour half the egg preparation and let it cook until it starts to crust. Have over half the fish and the delights of the sea, wrap the omelet and let it blush. Remove, melt the remaining butter and prepare the second omelet. Sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve with a mixture of lettuce.
For tomato lovers can give more color and flavor to the recipe by watering it in the end before serving with tomato sauce.

Tomato sauce: peel and pinch the onion and garlic teeth roughly. Put it in a pot, add the olive oil and bring it to the fire, stirring from time to time until it becomes soft. Water with the tomato, stir and let it cook. Correct the seasonings, remove and crush.

fish-packets-with-snap-peas-tomatoes-and.name: Fish Packets With Snap Peas, Tomatoes, And Herb Butter
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Mix butter, herbs, 1 tsp. salt, and 1/2 tsp. pepper in a small bowl.

Fold parchment sheets in half and use scissors to cut halves into 4 large hearts. Unfold and place parchment hearts open on a work surface. Spoon 1 Tbsp. herb butter in the center of one half of each heart, then divide snap peas, tomatoes, and garlic evenly into small piles over butter. Lay fish over vegetables, then top with 1 Tbsp. herb butter; season each with 1/8 tsp. salt and a pinch of pepper. Fold parchment over and crimp edges tightly to form a sealed packet.

Transfer packets to 2 large rimmed baking sheets, arranging in a single layer. Bake until just cooked through and a tester inserted through parchment slides through fish easily, about 13 minutes. Carefully cut open packets (steam will escape). Top with basil.
Butter can be made 3 days ahead; cover and chill. Fish packets can be assembled 4 hours ahead; chill. Let sit at room temperature 15 minutes before cooking.

fish-pasta-teleculinaria.name: Fish Pasta
instructions: Cook the fish in salted water for 10 to 15 minutes. Remove and reserve the broth from the cooking. Peel and pinch the onion and garlic teeth. Wash, remove the seeds and pinch the pepper.
In a frying pan with the olive oil, put onion, garlic and pepper and let it saute. Add the tomato pulp, pasta and broth from the cooking of the fish to cover and cook for 8 to 10 minutes.
Adicione os peixes e os tomates-cereja cortados ao meio, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe apurar, durante uns minutos. Retire e sirva, polvilhado com coentros picados.

fish-pasta-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Fish Pasta Recipe
fish-pasta-recipe-teleculinaria.original_name: Receita fácil de massada de peixe
instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, o louro e a cebola e os alhos picados e deixe alourar, mexendo de vez em quando. Regue com o vinho e, minutos depois, acrescente o tomate, mexa e deixe cozinhar um pouco.
Add the shellfish broth, let it boil, add the pasta, fish and shellfish. Season with salt, pyri and pepper and stir. Let cook for about 15 minutes, in mild heat.
When 5 minutes have passed, remove the shrimps and peel them, reserving some with the shell to decorate. If necessary, add some water.
At the end of the cooking, correct the seasonings, sprinkle with the coarsely chopped corianders and remove from the fire. Gather all shrimps, wrap and serve immediately.

fish-patties-teleculinaria.name: Fish Patties
instructions: Prepare the filling: cook the fish in salted water, then remove for a dish and let it cool. Coat the broth and reserve. Wipe the fish skin and pimples and shred it.

Sauce the onion, garlic and garlic, chopped, in a pot with melted margarine, then add the flour and mix well. Add 125 ml of the fish broth and the milk, slowly and always stirring, until you get a cream. Retrieve salt and season with pepper, nutmeg and lemon juice. Add chopped parsley and fish, wrap and let it warm up a bit. Remove from the fire and reserve.

Prepare the dough: Light a wide pot with water, margarine and lemon peel. Season with salt and let it boil. Dispose of the lemon peel, add the flour, at once, stir until the dough rises from the bottom of the pot and then form a ball.

Put the dough on a floury bench, let it trim, then crush it slightly, split it into two balls and extend it finely with the roll. Have small portions of the filling in the center, away from each other, fold the dough on top and, with a glass, cut in the shape of a rissol. Pass the rissols through the beaten eggs and then by grated bread and fry them in hot oil on both sides until they are golden. Drain on absorbent paper.

Prepare the accompaniment: cook the peas and carrots in salted water, then drain, cool and mix with the corn, previously drained. Involve mayonnaise and lead to cold. Serve as an accompaniment of the rhyssols.
You can freeze the rissols after you've had it and fry them another time.

fish-patties-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Fish Patties Recipe
instructions: Light a pot with water, margarine and a pinch of salt and let it boil. Add the flour in the form of rain, always stirring until a homogeneous dough becomes. Remove and reserve.

Peel and wash the onion, carrot and garlic, pinch the onion and garlic finely and grate the carrot. Bring to the fire a pot with water and salt, when boiling add the fish and let it cook. Remove and reserve. Heat the olive oil, add the onions and garlic, flour and milk in thread, always stirring. Remove, correct the seasonings and add the carrots and undone fish. Let it cook a little until the carrots are cooked, remove from the heat and season with lemon juice, chopped parsley, salt and pepper.

Extend the dough on a flour-sprinkled countertop, have some filling on top and fold. Cut in the form of rissol and repeat until the dough and filling are finished. Pass through the egg shakes and bread grated and let it fry in hot oil on both sides.

fish-pickle-teleculinaria.name: Fish Pickle
instructions: Season the fish posts with 2 chopped garlic, lemon juice, some milk, salt and pepper and let marinate for a few minutes. Then pour them out and core them into hot olive oil. Remove and reserve.

Peel the onions and cut them into half-moons. In a frying pan, saute the onions in the fish sauce as well as the other chopped garlic. Add the pepper, seedless and cut into strips, and the chopped parsley. Put the fish back in the frying pan, cover and let it stew until the fish becomes soft.
Cool with vinegar and white wine and boil until alcohol evaporates. Put the fish on a platter, water it with the scale and serve hot.

fish-pie-argiro.name: Fish Pie

ingredients.item: 4 potatoes cooked and cut into cubes
300 greaves of salmon (unbled and finely chopped)
Beated egg to grind the pie
4 potatoes cooked and cut into cubes
300 greaves of salmon (unbled and finely chopped)
Beated egg to grind the pie

instructions: Clean the leeks, wash them, and cut them into thin slices.
Clean and cut the onion into thin slices.
Rub the carrot on a thick grater.
Heat the olive oil in a pan and sauce the leaves over medium heat for 5 minutes, wither.
Remove from heat and set them aside for a while to cool.
In a bowl beat the egg well.
Add the fresh cream cheese and salmon or filleted, chopped fish.
Add salt and pepper.
Add to the filling of the fish pie, the saved vegetables, carrot, potatoes and dill.
Mix the mixture.

fish-pie-with-potatoes-leeks-zucchini-an.name: Fish Pie With Potatoes, Leeks, Zucchini, And Tomatoes

ingredients.item: Skinless firm white fish fillets (such as cod
